name: Lauren Hitt, Team Hickenlooper
subject: We need 130,000 people to step up.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020
body:
Yesterday morning we learned that the DNC has doubled the number of donors required to qualify for the fall and winter debates: from 65,000 to 130,000. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771630/691c9bd/6c2b07b2/11a4e91b/3470739931/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_template")
---
| Friend,

We've been updating you on the small-dollar donor threshold to participate in the presidential debates.

Well, yesterday morning we learned that the DNC has doubled the number of donors required to qualify for the fall and winter debates: **from 65,000 to 130,000.

If you haven't chipped in yet, we urgently need you to make your first gift now and help us keep building this team.** **[](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771630/691c9bd/6c2b07b2/11a4e918/3470739931/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190530_LH_20190530-fr-LH-dnc-ndnr_ndnr_b1&recurring=auto&amount=1&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** **[](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771630/691c9bd/6c2b07b2/11a4e919/3470739931/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190530_LH_20190530-fr-LH-dnc-ndnr_ndnr_b5&recurring=auto&amount=5&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** **[](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771630/691c9bd/6c2b07b2/11a4e916/3470739931/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190530_LH_20190530-fr-LH-dnc-ndnr_ndnr_b25&recurring=auto&amount=25&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** **[](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771630/691c9bd/6c2b07b2/11a4e917/3470739931/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190530_LH_20190530-fr-LH-dnc-ndnr_ndnr_b50&recurring=auto&amount=50&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** **[](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771630/691c9bd/6c2b07b2/11a4e914/3470739931/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190530_LH_20190530-fr-LH-dnc-ndnr_ndnr_b100&recurring=auto&amount=100&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** **[](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771630/691c9bd/6c2b07b2/11a4e915/3470739931/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190530_LH_20190530-fr-LH-dnc-ndnr_ndnr_bother&recurring=auto&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Across the country, we've seen an incredible response to John's message of ending our crisis of division and his impressive record. He's the only one in this race who has delivered on big progressive policies that DC only talks about -- passing tough new gun laws, and creating the number one economy in the country with near universal healthcare.

We've seen how John's message and his record resonates, and we want to make sure it isn't excluded from the debate stage.

[**_If you want to see John 's voice represented on the debate stage throughout this primary, please become a supporter now. Just $1 will do the job._**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771630/691c9bd/6c2b07b2/11a4e912/3470739931/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190530_LH_20190530-fr-LH-dnc-ndnr_ndnr_contribbutton&recurring=auto&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Thank you,
Lauren

Lauren Hitt
Communications Director
Hickenlooper 2020 **[](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771630/691c9bd/6c2b07b2/11a4e913/3470739931/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190530_LH_20190530-fr-LH-dnc-ndnr_ndnr_contribbutton&recurring=auto&amount=1&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**

**** ****
---
| | Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020
---

PO Box 6377, Denver, CO 80206
Contributions or gifts to Hickenlooper 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, you can join the Hickenlooper 2020 team by **[_signing up right here_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771630/691c9bd/6c2b07b2/11a4e910/3470739931/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/join-in")**.
Keep us company on the campaign trail by joining us on [_**Facebook**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771630/691c9bd/6c2b07b2/11a4e911/3470739931/VEsHBA/ "https://www.facebook.com/JohnHickenlooper/"), [_**Twitter**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771630/691c9bd/6c2b07b2/11a4e90e/3470739931/VEsHBw/ "https://twitter.com/hickenlooper"), [_**Instagram**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771630/691c9bd/6c2b07b2/11a4e90f/3470739931/VEsHBg/ "https://www.instagram.com/johnhickenlooper/"), and [_**YouTube**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771630/691c9bd/6c2b07b2/11a4e90c/3470739931/VEsHAQ/ "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC82O0Byp_ny13O0LkO1UpUg/featured").
We love staying connected to you--but if at any point you'd like to opt out, you can do so right [here](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771630/691c9bd/6c2b07b2/11a4e90d/3470739931/VEsHAA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").
If we're not reaching you at the correct email address, please [_**update your information here**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771630/691c9bd/6c2b07b2/11a4e910/3470739931/VEsHAw/ "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/join-in").

name: Dick Durbin
subject: We can't take anything for granted
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
[**Help win the fight for a Democratic Senate. Contribute $5 before the deadline.**](http://action.dickdurbin. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-may-2019-eom?refcode=em190530&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
Peter,
We know how urgent it is that we defeat President Trump in 2020, but we can't stop there.
In order to end this era of Republican obstruction and finally start making progress for the American people, we must elect a Democratic majority in the Senate.
I'm working hard to make that happen, but I need your support. Our end-of-month fundraising deadline is almost here, and we need everyone to help us meet our goals.
[**To win back the Senate in 2020, we must start working now to ensure we have the resources for victory. Can you stand with me and pitch in $5 before the deadline?**](http://action.dickdurbin. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-may-2019-eom?refcode=em190530&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
We can't take anything for granted, Peter. We know the Republicans will fight tooth and nail to take back the House, keep the Senate, and re-elect President Trump.
If they succeed, that will spell the end of affordable health care. It will be a disaster for our efforts to fight climate change. Women's rights will still be on the line for years to come.
But we have the power to fight back. Not only can we elect a new President, but also take back the Senate so we can start to undo President Trump's damage and move our country forward.
[**Together, we can ensure Democrats take back the Senate in 2020. Join me in the fight and contribute $5 now before our crucial end-of-month fundraising deadline.**](http://action.dickdurbin. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-may-2019-eom?refcode=em190530&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
My best,
Dick Durbin
**[CONTRIBUTE](http://action.dickdurbin. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-may-2019-eom?refcode=em190530&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

* * *
Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Should you want to unsubscribe, you can [click here](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4cbe/42ab3cf4/7cbc99f5/135d6ca8/1291603118/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). Join Senator Durbin in taking on powerful special interests on behalf of hard-working middle class families by [making a contribution to our campaign here.](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4cbe/42ab3cf4/7cbc99f5/135d6ca9/1291603118/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/durbin_footer")
Friends of Dick Durbin
Attn: Online Department
101 W. Grand, Suite 200
Chicago, IL 60654

name: Bernie 2020
subject: Can you chip in before midnight tomorrow?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2020
body:
There's only one way that we will win.
# [](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/8915?t=1&akid=1508%2E150750%2EbDIrjl)

Friends -
As we are approaching tomorrow's end-of-month fundraising deadline, we wanted to send you a quick reminder:
**Bernie doesn't spend his time asking millionaires and billionaires for money.** The only way we are funding this campaign is from lots of people giving what they can to build our movement.
That is how we will win this election. And that is why it's important that we keep pace with our opponents who collect stacks of $2,800 max-out checks from the wealthy.
So today we're asking you to make your first donation to our 2020 campaign. How about it?
[**Contribute $3 before tomorrow's deadline to build the organization required to win this election and transform our country. Bernie cannot do this alone.**](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/11505?refcode=em190530-2-45&t=26&akid=1508%2E150750%2EbDIrjl)
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/11505?refcode=em190530-2-45&t=27&akid=1508%2E150750%2EbDIrjl)
We don't have wealthy campaign contributors lining up to support our movement. That's all right. There are more of us than there are of them, and together we are unstoppable.
In solidarity,
Team Bernie

Paid for by Bernie 2020
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com**. If you need to, [**unsubscribe here**](https://bernie.actionkit.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=28&akid=1508%2E150750%2EbDIrjl). You can also [sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/fewer-emails/?t=29&akid=1508%2E150750%2EbDIrjl). We hope you'll stay, because emails are such an important part of how we organize and how we raise money. In fact, there is no single greater source for our campaign's fundraising than emails like this one. And that's important, because no one person, not even Bernie Sanders, can take on Trump and the billionaire class alone.

Before you go about the rest of your day, help power our fight against the billionaire class by [making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-email-template?refcode=em-footer&t=30&refcode2=1508_150750_bDIrjl&akid=1508%2E150750%2EbDIrjl).
Submit this form to [update your contact information](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/update-info/?t=31&akid=1508%2E150750%2EbDIrjl).

name: Bennet HQ
subject: Sorry to email so late
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| | | [**"We need to build a massive coalition to ensure that Trump is a one-term president"**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba2bb/134673f2/36ab771/6996e733/2105698186/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emaildebate?refcode=EM_FR_B4_053019_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500")

[](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba2bb/134673f2/36ab771/6996e733/2105698186/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emaildebate?refcode=EM_FR_B4_053019_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500")
Team,

We're sorry to email you so late but Michael just walked off stage, [**and he hit it out of the ballpark tonight during his CNN Town Hall.**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba2bb/134673f2/36ab771/6996e733/2105698186/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emaildebate?refcode=EM_FR_B4_053019_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500")

It was clear from the get-go that Michael has a deeply-held vision for America and its future. Michael demonstrated that he has an ambitious vision for how to build opportunity for every American and the toughness needed to beat Trump.

And the response shows Michael is tapping into the heartfelt concerns and aspirations of Americans.

It was an amazing town hall -- and all of us are immensely proud of Michael and how he presented his vision for a brighter, bolder American future. He isn't afraid to tell the truth to the American people.
---
[**Now, team, we need your help. Can you pitch in with a donation right away to help us continue getting Michael 's message out? Whether it's $3, $10, or $25, your contribution will help us spread the word.**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba2bb/134673f2/36ab771/6996e733/2105698186/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emaildebate?refcode=EM_FR_B4_053019_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500")

name: Donald Trump Jr.
subject: This bias must end
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
The Fake News media is trying to take us down. |
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=4fdec72202258f3f40dd1bc47de49aaffdad7b8ab1cae8fc9102066c681f9a712d7bd6f331cfc5f0b90824c2917114e63d3f7fed6661d69b)
---

Friend,

Attorney General William Barr said it. Even Special Counsel Robert Mueller said it: **There was NO COLLUSION and NO OBSTRUCTION.**

So why are the Democrats and Fake News media still conducting this ridiculous WITCH HUNT against my father?

My guess is that after two years and $35 MILLION of wasted taxpayer dollars, this hoax is too big to fail. They've realized they used all their resources on this failure of an investigation and have nothing to show for it.

Now, they have no choice but to continue running with this absurd narrative to appease the ELITES on the COAST that line their pockets.

We can't let them win.

Our May End-of-Month Deadline is coming up and we need to CRUSH our ambitious goal to send their MEGA HOLLYWOOD DONORS a powerful message. Our goal of **$2,000,000** is so critical, that every donation before 11:59 PM TONIGHT will be TRIPLE-MATCHED.

---
| **[Please contribute ANY AMOUNT by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to have your contribution TRIPLE-MATCHED so that we can CRUSH our goal.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=0d6c04d325330d61b6974741519be319c258ff213361d94cb2e33ee442b299af58d52ff625d51537f8f06723a22c276c9c58c3aff62846a6)**

Maggie only won in 2016 by 1,017 votes, so her seat is sure to be a top target for Republicans looking to grow their ranks. The best way to guard this seat from their attacks is to hit each and every fundraising goal -- including today's. "" If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. "" "" "" "" Thank you, Team Maggie ""

name: Tim Kaine
subject: This is a huge deal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
I'm asking for your help in one of the toughest 2020 fights we have ahead of us.
| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek:

**I've said it before and I'll say it again: One of the most critical ways for our country to see real forward progress is to take back the Senate in 2020.** [**Will you make an online donation to my friend Senator Jeanne Shaheen's re-election campaign?**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1770/3e0906/7b0b6dae/3e308fbb/3119271176/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-shaheen-2020?source=20190531_1_FR_TK_Shaheen&amount=30&refcode=20190531_1_FR_TK_Shaheen&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+Will+you+make+an+online+donation+to+my+f&utm_campaign=20190531_1_FR_TK_Shaheen")

I want to get things done in Washington. Jeanne wants to get things done in Washington. And I'll bet you that families across the country want us to get things done! But when Democrats are in the minority party, it can get really tough to pass strong legislation that makes a difference in people's lives. Instead, we have to spend a lot of our time playing defense. Whether it's trying to stop the GOP from ripping away health care or blocking the confirmation of far-right judges who would roll back the accomplishments we made with President Obama, too much of the American people's elected leaders' time is taken up navigating political fights.

**Next year, we have a chance to change that. Taking back the Senate starts with protecting our incumbent Democrats.**[**Click here to pitch in to Sen. Shaheen's campaign and help make sure she's ready to win.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1770/3e0906/7b0b6dae/3e308fba/3119271176/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-shaheen-2020?source=20190531_1_FR_TK_Shaheen&amount=30&refcode=20190531_1_FR_TK_Shaheen&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+Click+here+to+pitch+in+to+Sen+Shaheens+c&utm_campaign=20190531_1_FR_TK_Shaheen")

So far this year, outside groups are spending more against Sen. Shaheen than all other in-cycle Democratic Senators _combined_. That's a huge deal. It means that she'll be facing one of the toughest re-election fights in the country in 2020. Any support we can give her now is going to go a long way towards pushing back on that outside money and building a strong foundation for victory.

I know you've been on my team for the long haul. And I really appreciate your support -- it's what pushes me to keep fighting every day in the halls of Congress for the values we share. And your dedication to those values is why I'm asking you to step up and support Senator Shaheen's re-election campaign today. You can make an online gift through this secure link: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-shaheen-2020**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1770/3e0906/7b0b6dae/3e308fb9/3119271176/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-shaheen-2020?source=20190531_1_FR_TK_Shaheen&amount=30&refcode=20190531_1_FR_TK_Shaheen&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureactbluecomdonatetkshaheen2020&utm_campaign=20190531_1_FR_TK_Shaheen")

_-Tim_ | ****[**DONATE**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1770/3e0906/7b0b6dae/3e308fb8/3119271176/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-shaheen-2020?source=20190531_1_FR_TK_Shaheen&amount=30&refcode=20190531_1_FR_TK_Shaheen&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20190531_1_FR_TK_Shaheen")****

From: Sri Preston Kulkarni
Sent: Thursday, May 30, 2019
To: My friend
Subject: How we will win this time!

Friends, the number one question I get asked is, "Why are you running for Congress again?" People want to know how we will close the 4.9% gap from last time and win in 2020.

I'm running again because this district desperately wants change, as we saw from the last election, when things moved rapidly in our direction. Together, our campaign made history: closing the gap with Pete Olson by 30 points from the previous midterm.

We know we can win because we already made a huge change with your help, and the help of thousands of others who want their government to be more responsive and transparent. It's clear that our community doesn't want a representative who said in 2016 that he was proud to be the most right-wing member of Congress.

Here's what we are doing differently to win in 2020: We're starting earlier, we have assembled the professional tools and infrastructure we need to win, we've started registering new voters, and our grassroots volunteer force which was already huge is growing every day. Most importantly, we've got you on our team, my friend!

Together we can flip this seat in 2020 and give the people of Texas' 22nd District the representation they deserve - someone who puts their needs first and works tirelessly to unite our communities, protect our families, and defend our values.

[**Team , the momentum is with us and I'm asking for your help to keep it growing stronger. Our end-of-month deadline is at midnight tomorrow. Can you make a grassroots contribution to make sure we hit our goal and keep building on the momentum we've started?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/yJzpXCrwBw8i4DeeeuSuu7sNFvmISxeBcVqm7t3F524=/wtmleK4R57H7eQqLL4j9xBAo0trqGfHGhOGuARuqPKU=?refcode=05302019)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/yJzpXCrwBw8i4DeeeuSuu7sNFvmISxeBcVqm7t3F524=/wtmleK4R57H7eQqLL4j9xBAo0trqGfHGhOGuARuqPKU=?refcode=05302019)

Thank you my friend!

Sri Preston Kulkarni

**STAY TUNED WITH OUR MOVEMENT!**

I'm running again because this district desperately wants change, as we saw from the last election, when things moved rapidly in our direction. Together, our campaign made history: closing the gap with Pete Olson by 30 points from the previous midterm. We know we can win because we already made a huge change with your help, and the help of thousands of others who want their government to be more responsive and transparent. It's clear that our community doesn't want a representative who said in 2016 that he was proud to be the most right-wing member of Congress. Here's what we are doing differently to win in 2020: We're starting earlier, we have assembled the professional tools and infrastructure we need to win, we've started registering new voters, and our grassroots volunteer force which was already huge is growing every day. Most importantly, we've got you on our team, my friend! Together we can flip this seat in 2020 and give the people of Texas' 22nd District the representation they deserve - someone who puts their needs first and works tirelessly to unite our communities, protect our families, and defend our values. Thank you my friend! Sri Preston Kulkarni STAY TUNED WITH OUR MOVEMENT! = = Paid for by Sri for Congress. Sri for Congress PO Box 898 Sugarland TX 77478 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please =.

Hi Peter,
I just took a look at where we are with our last May fundraising goal, **and ****we 're a bit behind where we need to be:** We were aiming to raise $125,000 this week, but as of this morning, we're only about two-thirds of the way there.

If we hustle now, I think we can turn things around before midnight tonight.
You haven't given to Kirsten's campaign for president yet, but I need you to **[make your first donation TODAY, before the month is over at midnight, to help us get back on track with our May end-of-month fundraising goal and help guarantee Kirsten's on the debate stage. Just $1 helps, but you have to donate now to make it count:](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f97749a/2ae112ef/693252c5/357c95b2/2389986094/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctbWF5LWVvbSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMzE0Ny1mci1nZnAtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dZV0p5WldOMWNuSnBibWNnZlgwPSI6IiJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-may-eom?refcode=jtk3147-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $1](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f97749a/2ae112ef/693252c5/357c95bd/2389986094/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctbWF5LWVvbSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMzE0Ny1mci1nZnAtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dZV0p5WldOMWNuSnBibWNnZlgwPSI6IiJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-may-eom?refcode=jtk3147-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=1")

We might be an underdog in this race right now, but Kirsten didn't get in this expecting to coast. She's going to keep doing the hard, necessary work of putting women and families at the center of the national conversation, no matter what the naysayers have to say about it.
She was the first candidate to commit to only nominating judges who will uphold _Roe v. Wade_ to protect abortion rights. Our Family Bill of Rights would level the playing field for America's kids and families. And she has a plan to get dark money out of politics and establish clean elections.
On top of all that, she's refused to take money from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists or fossil fuel executives--and we don't have an individual super PAC.
That makes hitting goals like our May end-of-month one that much harder, but we're committed to running an honest, transparent campaign. That's the kind of administration Kirsten will build in the White House, too.
Before midnight tonight: **Make your first donation to our campaign, Peter --just $1 helps guarantee Kirsten's on the debate stage, but anything above that you can give goes a long way toward helping us hit our May fundraising goal before the month is out.**
**[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-may-eom](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f97749a/2ae112ef/693252c5/357c95b2/2389986094/VEsB/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctbWF5LWVvbSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMzE0Ny1mci1nZnAtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dZV0p5WldOMWNuSnBibWNnZlgwPSI6IiJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-may-eom?refcode=jtk3147-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

"" If we hustle now, I think we can turn things around before midnight tonight. You haven't given to Kirsten's campaign for president yet, but I need you to "" If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | "" | "" | | "" | "" We might be an underdog in this race right now, but Kirsten didn't get in this expecting to coast. She's going to keep doing the hard, necessary work of putting women and families at the center of the national conversation, no matter what the naysayers have to say about it. She was the first candidate to commit to only nominating judges who will uphold Roe v. Wade_ to protect abortion rights. Our Family Bill of Rights would level the playing field for America's kids and families. And she has a plan to get dark money out of politics and establish clean elections. On top of all that, she's refused to take money from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists or fossil fuel executives--and we don't have an individual super PAC. That makes hitting goals like our May end-of-month one that much harder, but we're committed to running an honest, transparent campaign. That's the kind of administration Kirsten will build in the White House, too. Before midnight tonight: Make your first donation to our campaign, Peter --just $1 helps guarantee Kirsten's on the debate stage, but anything above that you can give goes a long way toward helping us hit our May fundraising goal before the month is out. name: Jason Yates
subject: Sunday: National Call to Pray for President Trump
body:
| | Peter,

I invite you to join Christians across the nation on Sunday, June 2, by praying for President Trump.

1 Timothy 2:2 calls us to pray for kings and all those in authority that we may live peaceful and quiet lives in all godliness and holiness.

The political divide in Washington, D.C. is widening, and Congress is in a political gridlock leaving our nation at a serious crossroad. The only hope for healing in our country is God Himself (2 Chronicles 7:14).

**Rev. Franklin Graham, along with 250 Christian leaders, is****asking followers of Christ across our nation to set aside June 2 as a special day of national prayer for President Trump:** “The onslaught from the President’s enemies is unbelievable. In the history of our country, no president has been attacked as he has. The lies and the deceptions rage on.”

He continued, “I want the President to know, and to feel, and to understand that the prayers of millions of people are behind him. My prayer is that President Trump will know and understand the power of God in a new way and that he will seek His face as he leads this nation to greatness with God’s help.” Please join us in prayer on Sunday. Pray on your own, with your family, your community group, or your church.

We’ve created[ three prayer points with scriptures](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iUWAxPKyT6pyCRSr2EF9a1FVTakre_ftA6KDLAQirH5TnaAch4o6Lgf7QE_WVhBAkA&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190531apl01&n=1) to help guide your time. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iUWAxPKyT6pyCRSr2EF9a1FVTakre_ftA6KDLAQirH5TnaAch4o6Lgf7QE_WVhBAkA&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190531apl01&n=2) **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190531apl01&n=3)
---
* * *
©2019 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190531apl01&n=4).
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sQ5cX_bEu8cPkWYJ2Mr5-wZKXu3dY5XWtaPM4h3adih&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190531apl01&n=5) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=pQzeq3ow3I_GdDaQAo3jThGOsBJSnRMSTnYdqF5RrFw9RIPs8jarlLWzFCwppO5s&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190531apl01&n=6) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y-k8vVr8cJ4CYXZKhF1mHHVF_9enIccjId0FBdBJJ7Kr&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190531apl01&n=7)

subject: (no subject)

body:
No no no, team. We just checked in on our ActBlue progress, and not enough Democrats are stepping up to stand with Ed!

ActBlue Tracker
Help Ed reach our $14,000 goal by donating $10 or more before midnight!

If we don't reach our goal by May 31, we could risk falling out of the fight against President Trump's dangerous agenda.

Ed is a thorn in President Trump's side.

When President Trump's extremist FCC chair threw out net neutrality rules, Ed fought back by leading the charge to pass legislation in the Senate to restore a free and open internet.

When President Trump pulled out of the Paris climate agreement, Ed knew we needed a Green New Deal resolution to fuel a movement to combat the climate crisis.

And just this week, when the Trump administration decided to sell weapons to Saudi Arabia without Congressional review, Ed was among the first to stand up and denounce President Trump for selling out America's moral leadership around the world.

>From day one of Donald Trump's presidency, Americans have rallied behind Democratic champions who are standing up to Trump's dangerous agenda.

And that's exactly what Ed is doing every day. Will you stand with Ed today and pitch in $10 or more to help us reach our goal?

Contributions or gifts to The Markey Committee are not tax deductible.

name: Whitney Holt
subject: a few seconds
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger For Congress
body:
I wouldn't be doing my job if I didn't reach out to you directly.
| | Hi Peter,

You might have noticed you've been receiving more emails than usual from our campaign over the past few days.

I hate to add to the noise in your inbox, but I wouldn't be doing my job as Abigail's Finance Director if I didn't reach out on the last day -- _today!_ \-- of our May fundraising period. ****[That's why I'm asking you directly: Peter, can you support us ahead of tonight's deadline? We only have $1,267 left to raise, and I know if you can step up with a donation of any size, we'll reach our May goal. >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/KoaAnfHQMQEKzNCrAc7aIAyVb2CJ2wcRMweV5gAnuJo=/8KaMQwGZFgroOckGf_erdwsKWjkpvjMGVk1F7F1vxwc=?refcode=em_fr_2019.05.31_b1_wh_all&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,1000,2800)**** | ******[CONTRIBUTE »](https://act.myngp.com/el/KoaAnfHQMQEKzNCrAc7aIAyVb2CJ2wcRMweV5gAnuJo=/8KaMQwGZFgroOckGf_erdwsKWjkpvjMGVk1F7F1vxwc=?refcode=em_fr_2019.05.31_b1_wh_all&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,1000,2800)******
---
It's critical that we end May with a fundraising number that reflects the hard work we've already put into Abigail's competitive re-election campaign, and that prepares us for the tough tests we'll face on the road ahead.

Month after month, we've met our targets because members of this grassroots network have pitched in their hard-earned $5, $25, and $50.

Those resources will be indispensable as attacks on Abigail from Super PACs and special interests increase.

Unfortunately, the costs associated with running a campaign -- everything from hiring field organizers, to ordering yard signs, and getting our ads on the air -- are _high_. **So, quite literally, we can 't afford to fall short on our fundraising goals.**

****[I'm doing all I can to prepare us for our expensive toss-up race by making sure we hit tonight's goal, but I need your help. Peter, please consider chipping in a few dollars before you close this email.](https://act.myngp.com/el/KoaAnfHQMQEKzNCrAc7aIAyVb2CJ2wcRMweV5gAnuJo=/8KaMQwGZFgroOckGf_erdwsKWjkpvjMGVk1F7F1vxwc=?refcode=em_fr_2019.05.31_b1_wh_all&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,1000,2800) >>****
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $15>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/KoaAnfHQMQEKzNCrAc7aIAyVb2CJ2wcRMweV5gAnuJo=/8KaMQwGZFgroOckGf_erdwsKWjkpvjMGVk1F7F1vxwc=?refcode=em_fr_2019.05.31_b1_wh_all&amount=15&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,1000,2800)**
**[Express donate $25>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/KoaAnfHQMQEKzNCrAc7aIAyVb2CJ2wcRMweV5gAnuJo=/8KaMQwGZFgroOckGf_erdwsKWjkpvjMGVk1F7F1vxwc=?refcode=em_fr_2019.05.31_b1_wh_all&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,1000,2800)**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/KoaAnfHQMQEKzNCrAc7aIAyVb2CJ2wcRMweV5gAnuJo=/8KaMQwGZFgroOckGf_erdwsKWjkpvjMGVk1F7F1vxwc=?refcode=em_fr_2019.05.31_b1_wh_all&amount=50&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,1000,2800)**
**[Express donate $100>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/KoaAnfHQMQEKzNCrAc7aIAyVb2CJ2wcRMweV5gAnuJo=/8KaMQwGZFgroOckGf_erdwsKWjkpvjMGVk1F7F1vxwc=?refcode=em_fr_2019.05.31_b1_wh_all&amount=100&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,1000,2800)**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/KoaAnfHQMQEKzNCrAc7aIAyVb2CJ2wcRMweV5gAnuJo=/8KaMQwGZFgroOckGf_erdwsKWjkpvjMGVk1F7F1vxwc=?refcode=em_fr_2019.05.31_b1_wh_all&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,1000,2800)**
I know your time is valuable, so this shouldn't take more than a few seconds. Thanks for all of your hard work.

Whitney Holt
Finance Director
Abigail Spanberger for Congress

| Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative for Virginia's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/KoaAnfHQMQEKzNCrAc7aIAyVb2CJ2wcRMweV5gAnuJo=/mntNUo3bcgt1axxWZM-yAoA9c38U9sDKIAt-np6ndFI=)

GREG PENCE VICTORY is a joint fundraising committee composed of GREG PENCE FOR CONGRESS, MUSTANG PAC, GREAT AMERICA COMMITTEE, and the NRCC.
Any contribution to GREG PENCE VICTORY permissible under the Federal Election Campaign Act, as amended, from contributors who have not exceeded their applicable contribution limits will be allocated among the participating committees as follows:
a) The first $5,600 from an individual shall be allocated to GREG PENCE FOR CONGRESS, to the maximum allowed for the Primary and General Election. The second $5,000 from an individual shall be allocated to MUSTANG PAC. The next $5,000 shall go to the GREAT AMERICA COMMITTEE. Any remaining funds up to $35,500 shall go to the NRCC.
b) The first $11,200 of a joint contribution shall be allocated to GREG PENCE FOR CONGRESS, to the maximum allowed for the Primary and General Election. The second $10,000 of a joint contribution shall be allocated to MUSTANG PAC. The next $10,000 shall go to GREAT AMERICA COMMITTEE. Any remaining funds up to $71,000 shall go to the NRCC.
c) The first $5,600 from a federal non-multicandidate committee shall be allocated to GREG PENCE FOR CONGRESS, to the maximum allowed for the Primary and General Election. The second $5,000 from a federal non-multicandidate committee shall be allocated to MUSTANG PAC. The next $5,000 shall go to the GREAT AMERICA COMMITTEE. Any remaining funds up to $35,500 shall go to the NRCC.
d) The first $10,000 from a federal multicandidate committee shall be allocated to GREG PENCE FOR CONGRESS, to the maximum allowed for the Primary and General Election. The second $5,000 shall be allocated to MUSTANG PAC. The next $5,000 shall go to the GREAT AMERICA COMMITTEE. Any remaining funds up to $15,000 shall go to the NRCC.
The contributor’s signature designates his or her contribution as described above. Contributions that exceed a contributor’s contribution limit to a participating committee shall be reallocated to the remaining participating committees according to this allocation formula and as permitted by law. Notwithstanding the allocation formula described above, contributions may be designated by the contributor for a specific committee, to the extent permitted by law.
The legal maximum that an individual and non-multicandidate political action committee may contribute to GREG PENCE VICTORY in a calendar year is $51,100 subject to the increase for inflation in odd-numbered years. The legal maximum amount couples may contribute is $102,200 if each spouse so designates the contributions, subject to the increase for inflation in odd-numbered years. The legal maximum that a multi-candidate political action committee may contribute to GREG PENCE VICTORY is $35,000 in a calendar year. Notwithstanding the above, an individual and non-multicandidate committee may only contribute $2,800 per election to Greg Pence for Congress, and multicandidate committees may only contribute $5,000 per election to Greg Pence for Congress. The remaining participants of the joint fundraising committee are subject to yearly contribution limits.
The maximum an individual may contribute to a federal candidate is $2,800 per election subject to an increase for inflation during odd-numbered years; $5,000 per calendar year to a federal political action committee; and $35,500 per calendar year to a national party committee subject to an increase for inflation during odd-numbered years. Qualified multicandidate PACs may contribute $5,000 per election to a federal candidate, $5,000 per calendar year to a federal political action committee, and $15,000 per calendar year to a national party committee. Non-multicandidate PACs may contribute $2,800 per election to a federal candidate, $5,000 per calendar year to a federal political action committee and $35,500 per calendar year to a national party committee, subject to an increase for inflation during odd-numbered years. All funds received in response to this solicitation will be subject to federal contribution limits and prohibitions. Contributions from corporations, national banks, labor unions, foreign nationals without “green cards,” and federal government contractors are prohibited.
Contributions to GREG PENCE VICTORY, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer of each individual who contributes over $200 in a calendar year.
---

body:
Believe it or not, I dislike sending these fundraising pleas as much as you dislike reading them. | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931940a/1cd0ac28/22477875/356c8d08/3561420303/VEsH/ "https://www.joebiden.com")
---
[Peter, our fundraising team just reported that we're in the final 1,000 donation homestretch! Can you chip in before our midnight deadline?](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931940a/1cd0ac28/22477875/356c8d07/3561420303/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q22019?refcode=email-bsd-20190531hatethis-b1_FDR_ac_NA-F1_S1_C1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=20190531hatethis&utm_content=b1_FDR_ac_NA&utm_term=F1_S1_C1&amount=25")

Believe it or not, I dislike sending these fundraising pleas as much as you dislike reading them, but it's necessary to get the job done.

You see, the boss is counting on us to make sure we can keep this campaign running. And we're not accepting money from corporate PACs, only people.

**Can we count on you to step up for our supporters from Pennsylvania? We can reach 1,000 more donations by midnight tonight if we all dig deep, Peter:** | | [**DONATE $5**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931940a/1cd0ac28/22477875/356c8d06/3561420303/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q22019?refcode=email-bsd-20190531hatethis-b1_FDR_ac_NA-F1_S1_C1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=20190531hatethis&utm_content=b1_FDR_ac_NA&utm_term=F1_S1_C1&amount=5")

subject: RE: humbly asking:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |
---
| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcd3f/3eb3e2fc/40e44329/7449702a/3710173322/VEsH/ "https://www.julianforthefuture.com")
---
| | I'm about to ask you for $10 before my End of Month Deadline at midnight. But first, let me explain why. I didn't start off as a frontrunner in this presidential race. **And frankly, that 's fine. ** I wasn't born a frontrunner. I made my way up from San Antonio's West Side through hard work and with help from a community that believed in me. That's how I've lived my life. That's how I'll win this race. [_**And that 's why I'm asking you to be one of the 400 donors I need from Florida so I can officially qualify for the next set of Presidential debates and get my message out to the American people. >>**_](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcd3f/3eb3e2fc/40e44329/74497029/3710173322/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20190531_em_fr_b1_castro_all_rs&recur_weekly=on&recurring=on&amount=25") My grandmother immigrated to this country from Mexico as an orphan. My mother worked as an activist fighting for basic services for our community. My family never had it easy -- **but we never stopped working hard to achieve our dreams.** I'm not done working. Look -- you helped me hit our first debate threshold and pushed me to the front of the pack. And I know that, together, we can conquer this next hurdle, secure our spot at the next debates, and keep sharing our winning vision with voters. So I'm humbly asking: Can I count on you to pitch in $10, or whatever you can, today to help me qualify for the next set of Democratic Primary Debates? I need 400 donors from Florida to qualify. **** **** | | ****[**Chip in $10 now >> **](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcd3f/3eb3e2fc/40e44329/74497028/3710173322/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20190531_em_fr_b1_castro_all_rs&recur_weekly=on&recurring=on&amount=10")****

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Today's the last day to reach our May fundraising goal. Can you make your first contribution?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
On a typical presidential campaign, during the last few days of the month, I'd fly from big city to big city to scoop up as many big fat checks as possible. But that's not how we're running this campa | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852e5b0/45c30650/96930fd1/6698461a/2718057290/VEsH/ "https://elizabethwarren.com/")
---
There's only one way we're raising money for this campaign.

I'm not holding any fundraisers where you can only get in by writing a big check -- because a person's wealth shouldn't determine the amount of time they can spend with me or any presidential candidate.

I'm not counting on a billionaire to fund a Super PAC for me -- because the Democratic primary can't just be one more plaything for the rich and powerful.

I'm not taking a dime from federally registered lobbyists, corporate PACs, or PACs of any kind -- because our campaign is about people, not powerful special interests.

Instead, we're building a true grassroots campaign with grassroots donors -- because that's the only way we'll create a movement strong enough to make big, structural change in our economy, our government, and our democracy.

**[I wouldn't ask if it weren't powerfully important: Today is the last day to reach our May fundraising goal. So will you make your first donation to our campaign? $3 or whatever you can chip in would make a huge difference. We can't do this without you.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852e5b0/45c30650/96930fd1/6698461d/2718057290/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW1heTE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IjIwMTkwNTMxZW0xLXYxczMifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-may19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190531em1-v1s3")**

On a typical presidential campaign, during the last few days of the month, I'd fly from big city to big city to scoop up as many big fat checks as possible. We'd be trying to squeeze every last dollar out of bigwig donors to help hit our monthly fundraising goal.

They might come see me at a fancy reception in hedge fund offices or in a backyard of a huge mansion. They'd sip champagne, nibble on some food, and try to convince me that the tax loophole that just so happens to pad their pockets is also good for the whole country.

But I'm not running to be a president who only pays attention to the wealthy and well-connected.

I'm running to be everybody's president. My time is not for sale, and every supporter has an equal place in our movement.

If you ask me, that's what a campaign for president should be all about. Talking with people across the country, in their hometowns, about real solutions to real problems. And getting organized at the grassroots level to make change happen.

But this type of campaign is only possible if everyone who is able pitches in what they can.

I'm running to be the best president that money can't buy, but I can't do it alone. This is how we'll stop Washington from just answering to the beck and call of billionaires and giant corporations -- one grassroots donation at a time.

**[Please make your first contribution before tonight's fundraising deadline to own a piece of this campaign. Let's build something incredible together.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852e5b0/45c30650/96930fd1/6698461d/2718057290/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW1heTE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IjIwMTkwNTMxZW0xLXYxczMifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-may19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190531em1-v1s3")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth
| [**DONATE NOW**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852e5b0/45c30650/96930fd1/6698461d/2718057290/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW1heTE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IjIwMTkwNTMxZW0xLXYxczMifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-may19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190531em1-v1s3")
---

name: Jim Hood
subject: time's almost up
body:
|
---

Friend,

I'll get right to the point: we've only got a few hours left to hit our May fundraising goal, and we can't reach it without [**your help**](https://act.myngp.com/el/FpYh5zV9e7b0Z-aHMMYbYsxKGRvEJ2gK6ezDUPt-VUk=/npk9fFS31tR5U0CThhj1c_Hpupi0c1_TAuf8Y_btodk=?refcode=20190531&amount=25).

Our campaign is about improving the lives of hardworking Mississippians. That means building roads, investing in our schools and teachers, creating good-paying jobs, improving access to health care, and keeping our rural hospitals open.

This race isn't about partisanship, it's about priorities -- and my priority is, and always has been, Mississippi families.

**Friend, tonight 's fundraising deadline is a crucial show of strength for our campaign. Will you chip in to help us reach our goal before midnight?**
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: | Friend, I'll get right to the point: we've only got a few hours left to hit our May fundraising goal, and we can't reach it without . Our campaign is about improving the lives of hardworking Mississippians. That means building roads, investing in our schools and teachers, creating good-paying jobs, improving access to health care, and keeping our rural hospitals open. This race isn't about partisanship, it's about priorities -- and my priority is, and always has been, Mississippi families. Friend, tonight 's fundraising deadline is a crucial show of strength for our campaign. Will you chip in to help us reach our goal before midnight? If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Thank you, Jim Hood | |

name: =?utf-8?Q?Marc=20Flores?=
subject: Where we've been, and where we're going
body:
We've Been Busy
Hi Peter,

With the campaign well on its way, our staff has been working with great zeal in an effort to further our message and reach everyone we can. Over the past week, we have hosted and attended numerous events to meet and get to know our neighbors, and find out what we can do for them – what we can do for you.

Reaching Out to the Community

This past weekend, Marc met with supporters and interested members of our community at Archway Gallery – Texas’ oldest artist-owned art gallery. The evening presented a congenial combination of culture and community.

See more pics on Instagram! (http://www.instagram.com/marcfloresforcongress/?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=ca60cbdf95-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_05_30_03_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-ca60cbdf95-32267927)
Honoring Our Fallen Heroes
On Monday, we held a neighborhood barbecue and joined our country in commemorating our fallen heroes and honoring their sacrifice. For those who give the most they can, the least we can do is provide for them when they come home.
Find out more on Facebook! (https://www.facebook.com/marcfloresforcongress/?__tn__=kC-R&eid=ARC7IZ3q430mo2OFTL1nOJ7TfYhEc_58gXOXrmAQq9WDMj647LYRRTn8UY3x19rDG_WzuUdyjE8XX2fr&hc_ref=ARQVQ7J7YaMEVZ2JV0SVk6tQAxJ3cj3tRWLe1a28cw0T_Njwc3MxPrd4F-mCrMOXGwU&__xts__[0]=68.ARB8IZXaJn2bJhoOtbSAeYnhDkFYoX9WOY2ne_ytr76hAtPPHY9lGsIv9J2r7_cAc2O6Qc_zvhg2VDVMb_9AI_TiWdty8Y_tJaoyYCug7ItXXQF_eNFBoY-q7KrDEeE4dTSdKxb8TnqHlhCY9xBvzCUK7SqmtbxMvRys0_X6eDhr287z3_PILOYGbLf8iZ2wTfAQ8NarGek_6LcRnW_VzUFnZ0xzkxgDCX74s0VNL68FLdtQ5XH6XdT9aqbO0ALjS9wC6xrNRSeQfgUoI1Loo5knhl2ZF5f71xLui2myUqyWcSOVidwwv7ccy0iyBT4-u2YkqeiTwnRTyh96Qur7tQ1xQH3bn6MNaCtiB0aSk5d8_M-t4jfhnbYeKeGMqO-zvVz1yRdeoyt1n8L7sPFAJYtRPSv-3EpUU0fOfIOSDDzG1A&utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=ca60cbdf95-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_05_30_03_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-ca60cbdf95-32267927)
Our Schedule

Over the last few weeks, Marc and his staff have been attending community events with the unremitting objective of finding out how we can make a difference.

On Tuesday, Marc traveled to Austin to attend a Texas Tribune panel on a discussion to the end of the 2019 legislative session

Wednesday, members of Marc’s team attended the Down/East Dem's Planning Meeting, and discussed methods to “Get Out the Vote,” in an effort to get more of our neighbors registered to vote.

Yesterday, we started our first phone bank with Margo taking the reins! She reached out to more than 70 people.

And last night, we had yet another meet and greet hosted by one of our supporters!

What’s Next?

This weekend, Marc will be volunteering with Harris County outside of several local high school graduations to register new voters, ensuring that every person is able to exercise their right to vote!

On Saturday, we will be block walking in Scenic Woods, and on Monday we'll be attending their civic club meeting. There’s no better way to understand the needs of the people than by hearing from the people themselves.
How You Can Help

A campaign is only as effective as its supporters, and the most effective way to raise awareness is by word of mouth, so keep up to date on our social media, like, comment, and share to let your friends, family, and colleagues know about us! We’re glad you’re on our team!

Let’s make this difference together, because together, we can do better!
Stay up to date on Twitter! (http://twitter.com/MarcFloCongress?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=ca60cbdf95-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_05_30_03_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-ca60cbdf95-32267927)

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Over 1,000 Illegal Immigrants Apprehended in El Paso Sector, Largest Group Ever at Single Time
body:
"More than 1,000 illegal immigrants were apprehended by U.S. Customs and Border Protection agents near the U.S.-Mexico border early Wednesday..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c77df7aa2d&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Over 1,000 Illegal Immigrants Apprehended in El Paso Sector, Largest Group Ever at Single Time**

“More than 1,000 illegal immigrants were apprehended by U.S. Customs and Border Protection agents near the U.S.-Mexico border early Wednesday -- the largest ever group of migrants ever apprehended at a single time,” John Roberts and Travis Fedschun report.

“The fact is that [the Rio Grande Valley] is receiving caravan-equivalent numbers every seven days,” Rio Grande Valley Sector Chief Patrol Agent Rodolfo Karisch said.

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c42b20334d&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “President Trump sent a message of strength and leadership Thursday night when he announced he will impose escalating tariffs on Mexico in a bold move to halt the flow of illegal immigrants and protect our national security,” National Border Patrol Council President Brandon Judd writes in [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7fce9f21dd&e=3ee4985eea). “The congressional inaction we are now witnessing is made worse by Mexico’s refusal to enforce its own immigration laws, which are actually much stronger than our own.”
---
|
---
| “Mexico has been all too willing to allow its temporary trouble [to] become our permanent problem. These migrants move across Mexico, often in large caravans, with at least the tacit approval of our southern neighbor, and sometimes with actual active assistance,” Steve Cortes writes in [_RealClearPolitics_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=33a7599695&e=3ee4985eea). It is in no “way compassionate to encourage or tolerate lawlessness along a porous border, which has led to horrific human exploitation.”
---
|
---
| “Americans have heard politicians talk about high drug prices for years . . . But the Trump administration isn’t offering up just talk — we’re delivering results,” [Health and Human Services Secretary Alex Azar](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a6d7336fe1&e=3ee4985eea) writes in _The_ _Kansas City Star_. “In December for the first time in 46 years, the official government measure of inflation in drug prices actually dropped for all of 2018.”
---
|
---
| “Looking across the Detroit River to Canada, U.S. Labor Secretary Alexander Acosta on Wednesday urged the passage of a new trade deal between Canada, Mexico and the United States as a way to spur economic prosperity,” Breana Noble writes in [_The Detroit News_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e5f7e68e65&e=3ee4985eea). Emphasizing the new agreement’s labor protections, Secretary Acosta explained that NAFTA lacked such measures—causing automaker jobs to leave Michigan for Mexico. “If we can compete on an even playing field, we can win," he said.
---
|
---
| In [CNBC](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ff5b20f15f&e=3ee4985eea), Jeff Cox reports that the American economy grew by 3.1% in the first quarter, yet again beating Wall Street’s expectations. “In the bigger picture, growth easily surpassed what most economists had been expecting at the start of the year.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fa76adc339&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f8b4cd765a&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=263540d3b3)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Dr. Laura Kaplan-Weisman
subject: Maryland, stand with us
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
Yesterday, Our Revolution kicked off the Medicare for All Ambulance Tour.
# [](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a4e6/bed43eb/947da566/75faa4c3/1578055615/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-header-OR")
Friends,
My name is Dr. Laura Kaplan-Weisman. I'm a family physician from Maryland and a volunteer with Our Revolution Maryland fighting to win _Medicare for All_.
Yesterday, Our Revolution kicked off the _Medicare for All Ambulance Tour_. The first stop was in our home state: the district of **Majority Leader Steny Hoyer**. On Thursday, I joined Our Revolution and asked Leader Hoyer to support _Medicare for All_ legislation.
[](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a4e6/bed43eb/947da566/75faa4c2/1578055615/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-healthcare-md?source=em190531-b&noskip=true")
_Medicare for All_ is a progressive litmus test - either you're on the side of preventing and treating sickness and suffering or you're with corporate healthcare CEOs. We need to send a message to Democrats across the country: Support the _Medicare for All Act of 2019_ now.
[**Will you donate $5 to Our Revolution today so that we can provide essential support to local volunteer groups to take action and get their Representatives to co-sponsor the _Medicare for All Act of 2019_?**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a4e6/bed43eb/947da566/75faa4c2/1578055615/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-healthcare-md?source=em190531-b&noskip=true")
Our current healthcare payment system cannot be justified on moral, ethical, or even economic grounds. But we can fix the health crisis in our country. As a doctor, my prescription for our nation is universal healthcare.
Every day House Democrats fail to lead - every day we fail to pass _Medicare for All_ - lives are lost. We cannot stand by and let this happen.
[**Will you donate $5 to Our Revolution today so that we can provide essential support to Maryland volunteer groups to take action and get House Majority Leader Steny Hoyer and Reps. David Trone and Dutch Ruppersberger to co-sponsor the _Medicare for All Act of 2019_?**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a4e6/bed43eb/947da566/75faa4c2/1578055615/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-healthcare-md?source=em190531-b&noskip=true")
I joined Our Revolution because I refuse to stand by and allow the United States to be the only major country that does not guarantee health care as a fundamental right. And I'm willing to bet that you won't either.
We need to join together and make the urgency of this moment clear to our Members of Congress.

**[DONATE](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a4e6/bed43eb/947da566/75faa4c2/1578055615/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-healthcare-md?source=em190531-b&noskip=true")**

Together we will win the _Medicare for All_ revolution!
Dr. Laura Kaplan-Weisman
Healthcare Leader
Our Revolution, Maryland

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
PO Box 66208, Washington, DC 20035
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a4e6/bed43eb/947da566/75faa4cd/1578055615/VEsA/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a4e6/bed43eb/947da566/75faa4cc/1578055615/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMTIzIn0=/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a4e6/bed43eb/947da566/75faa4cf/1578055615/VEsO/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a4e6/bed43eb/947da566/75faa4ce/1578055615/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").

name: Kamala Harris
subject: Before the first debates
body:
Tonight is our last end-of-month deadline before the first round of
presidential debates begin, which means it’s absolutely crucial we hit our
$500,000 target before the clock strikes midnight.

I don’t want to alarm you, but my staff is a bit concerned about whether
we can get there. The truth is, we find ourselves falling short of our May
goal with just a few hours left to go. But I told them this grassroots
team would come through when it matters most -- you always do.

If enough of our supporters step up right now to add
their first
contribution, I think we can hit our target and place ourselves in the
strongest position possible heading into the first debate. Can I count on
you to add a donation before tonight’s end-of-month deadline?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190531-eom?refcode=ema190531-eom18-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&express_lane=true&t=1001&refcode2=5211_5755789_8G2TDL&akid=5211%2E5755789%2E8G2TDL ]Chip in $5 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190531-eom?refcode=ema190531-eom18-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=25&express_lane=true&t=1002&refcode2=5211_5755789_8G2TDL&akid=5211%2E5755789%2E8G2TDL ]Chip in $25 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190531-eom?refcode=ema190531-eom18-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=50&express_lane=true&t=1003&refcode2=5211_5755789_8G2TDL&akid=5211%2E5755789%2E8G2TDL ]Chip in $50 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190531-eom?refcode=ema190531-eom18-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=100&express_lane=true&t=1004&refcode2=5211_5755789_8G2TDL&akid=5211%2E5755789%2E8G2TDL ]Chip in $100 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190531-eom?refcode=ema190531-eom18-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=250&express_lane=true&t=1005&refcode2=5211_5755789_8G2TDL&akid=5211%2E5755789%2E8G2TDL ]Chip in $250 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190531-eom?refcode=ema190531-eom18-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&t=1006&refcode2=5211_5755789_8G2TDL&akid=5211%2E5755789%2E8G2TDL ]Another Amount

I’m going to be frank with you: with a crowded field like this, it’s going
to be difficult to break through the noise. The only way to set our
campaign apart from the rest is by reaching this goal. That’s how we can
win this primary and take the fight directly to Donald Trump.

As I begin to prepare to share our positive message on the national stage,
I want to know that you have my back -- and that you’re willing to help us
go into the first debate in a position of strength. So, I’m asking again:

Our last end-of-month deadline before the first debate is tonight, can I
count on you to pitch in a donation before midnight? Every dollar you give
will allow me to spend more time hitting the books and less time worrying
about fundraising in the weeks ahead.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190531-eom?refcode=ema190531-eom18-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&express_lane=true&t=1007&refcode2=5211_5755789_8G2TDL&akid=5211%2E5755789%2E8G2TDL ]Chip in $5 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190531-eom?refcode=ema190531-eom18-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=25&express_lane=true&t=1008&refcode2=5211_5755789_8G2TDL&akid=5211%2E5755789%2E8G2TDL ]Chip in $25 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190531-eom?refcode=ema190531-eom18-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=50&express_lane=true&t=1009&refcode2=5211_5755789_8G2TDL&akid=5211%2E5755789%2E8G2TDL ]Chip in $50 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190531-eom?refcode=ema190531-eom18-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=100&express_lane=true&t=1010&refcode2=5211_5755789_8G2TDL&akid=5211%2E5755789%2E8G2TDL ]Chip in $100 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190531-eom?refcode=ema190531-eom18-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=250&express_lane=true&t=1011&refcode2=5211_5755789_8G2TDL&akid=5211%2E5755789%2E8G2TDL ]Chip in $250 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190531-eom?refcode=ema190531-eom18-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&t=1012&refcode2=5211_5755789_8G2TDL&akid=5211%2E5755789%2E8G2TDL ]Another Amount

As you may know, I am refusing to take a dime from corporate PACs or
federal lobbyists. Instead, we are building a movement of the people, by
the people, and for ALL people.

That’s why your contribution matters so much right now, and it’s why I
know I can always turn to you in critical moments like these. Let’s end
May on a strong note.

For The People,

— Kamala Harris

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://action.kamalaharris.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=5211%2E5755789%2E8G2TDL

name: Cory Booker
subject: Two quick things
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Friend, Tonight's fundraising deadline is a big one for two reasons:
1. The first Democratic debates are next month. That means we're entering a new phase of this race starting tomorrow. More eyes will be on what we do.
2. Since there are so many candidates running, the DNC just raised the donor threshold to qualify for future debates from 65,000 to 130,000 -- and we need your help to grow this team (and fast!).

Look, I knew we'd be outraised in this race. We didn't spend the past couple of years cultivating an online donor base and we're not taking money from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists. We're building this campaign the right way. That starts with you. **If we don 't start closing the fundraising gap in moments like this, we run the risk of getting left off the national stage -- something an underdog campaign like ours can't afford.** [_**Will you chip in before tonight 's deadline? name: Bernie Sanders
subject: I am writing you today to ask you to please make a $3 contribution before our midnight fundraising deadline we’ve set for our campaign. This is important. Here’s why:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2020
body:
The truth is...
# [](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/8915?t=1&akid=1515%2E150750%2EXw0ujU)

**May Fundraising Deadline**

Requested donation for you: [**$3.00**](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/11505?refcode=em190531-1-45&t=2&akid=1515%2E150750%2EXw0ujU)
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/11505?refcode=em190531-1-45&t=3&akid=1515%2E150750%2EXw0ujU)

* * *

Friends -
One of the great challenges we face in the United States is whether we will become a vibrant democracy with a strong middle class, or whether we slide into an oligarchy in which the economic and political life of the country is controlled by a handful of billionaire families.
Because the truth is, today in America the economic and political system is stacked against working people. The rich get richer and use their wealth to buy elections. Working people fall behind and give up on the political process.
That is not democracy. That is oligarchy. And incremental change is not good enough. We need a political revolution.
That is what our campaign is about and what we will deliver when we are in the White House. But I cannot do it alone:
[**Please make a $3 contribution ahead of the end of month fundraising deadline we’ve set for the campaign — the last fundraising deadline before our debates. It ends at midnight, so please chip in today.**](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/11505?refcode=em190531-1-45&t=28&akid=1515%2E150750%2EXw0ujU)
We only get one chance on this Earth, and we may as well do something that people will remember decades from now. That’s what we are doing on this campaign, and it would not be possible without you.
Not me. Us.
Bernie
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/11505?refcode=em190531-1-45&t=29&akid=1515%2E150750%2EXw0ujU)

Paid for by Bernie 2020
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com**. If you need to, [**unsubscribe here**](https://bernie.actionkit.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=30&akid=1515%2E150750%2EXw0ujU). You can also [sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/fewer-emails/?t=31&akid=1515%2E150750%2EXw0ujU). We hope you'll stay, because emails are such an important part of how we organize and how we raise money. In fact, there is no single greater source for our campaign's fundraising than emails like this one. And that's important, because no one person, not even Bernie Sanders, can take on Trump and the billionaire class alone.

Before you go about the rest of your day, help power our fight against the billionaire class by [making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-email-template?refcode=em-footer&t=32&refcode2=1515_150750_Xw0ujU&akid=1515%2E150750%2EXw0ujU).
Submit this form to [update your contact information](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/update-info/?t=33&akid=1515%2E150750%2EXw0ujU).

name: ALERT (via Team Baer)
subject: The question of Impeachment Proceedings
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan for Colorado
body:
It is clear that there exist ample factual grounds to begin impeachment proceedings against the President of the United States.
|
---

| | On Wednesday morning, Special Counsel Robert Mueller made clear that the ball is in the court of the U.S. Congress:

"If we had confidence that the president did not commit a crime, we would have said so."

**Here 's what Dan said:

_" It is clear that there exist ample factual grounds to begin impeachment proceedings against the President of the United States.

Mueller's statements, and his report, make clear that further investigation and any warranted prosecution of the President is the responsibility of Congress. Under Article I of the U.S. Constitution, Congress has the power and the responsibility to carry forward this work on behalf of the American people."_**

It is imperative that we maintain a commitment to the rule of law. And when the facts are so plainly in front of us, to turn away from them is untenable.

In his comments, Mueller also re-confirmed what we have long known to be true: Russia launched a concerted attack on our political system and interfered in our elections. It's urgent that we take steps to protect our democratic institutions.

Dan went toe-to-toe with Vladimir Putin's Russia when he worked in President Obama's State Department. We need a Senator like him who understands what's at stake and how to hold dictators accountable and defend American values.

The White House's recent failures to comply with Congressional investigations only further demonstrate why Congress should open impeachment proceedings against Donald Trump. We need to elect a Senator like Dan who will uphold our democratic institutions and the rule of law.
To do this we'll need your help. Can you take a stand and pitch in $19 before his End of Month Deadline at midnight? | | **[**DONATE**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb826db/232dfd1/93ee0d9/62a1780b/3650343054/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190531_em_fr_b1_alert_all&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
---
Dan was just endorsed by the Foreign Policy For America Action Network -- a group that strives to elect champions of strong, principled American foreign policy.
It's never been more important to have experienced public servants like Dan in office instead of career politicians. We need leaders who will protect us from foreign adversaries, not bow down to their commands.

Thanks for your support,

Team Baer

** **
|
---
[](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb826db/232dfd1/93ee0d9/62a17808/3650343054/VEsE/ "https://www.facebook.com/DanForColorado/") [](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb826db/232dfd1/93ee0d9/62a17809/3650343054/VEsF/ "https://twitter.com/danbbaer")

Dan for Colorado
PO Box 1199
Denver, CO 80201

[Unsubscribe](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb826db/232dfd1/93ee0d9/62a1780e/3650343054/VEsC/ "https://go.danforcolorado.com/unsubscribe")

| | Paid for by Dan for Colorado

---
