name: Robin Hickenlooper
subject: Appreciation.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020
body:
As we finish off our third month of this journey, I am overcome with gratitude for everyone making it possible. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771637/691c9bd/6c2c8664/11a4eee1/1521812549/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_template")
---
| Friend,

As we finish off our third month of this journey, I am overcome with gratitude for everyone making it possible. There is not enough time or enough ways to say thank you. From the bottom of our hearts, thank you for your generosity and support.

This campaign has been a trying, rewarding, and unforgettable experience for John and me. **It 's surreal to see the person you love present his ideas, his vision, and his heart to people across the country.** To spread a vision for America that mirrors the progress we've achieved in Colorado--progressive policies and partnerships that have made our state safer, cleaner, and more equitable.

And it's surreal to see the person you love rejoice in the positive feedback and reflect deeply on the negative feedback and differing points of view.

Ultimately, the most rewarding parts of the campaign are the people. The people John meets, the people that support him, and the people that inspire him.

And that includes you, friend. We Are So Grateful.

Donations have helped this campaign grow. Conversations between friends and neighbors have helped create awareness and make connections across the country. Notes you've sent us have inspired and motivated.

It all keeps us going. Thank you.

[**_With you, we CAN take this campaign to the NEXT level. We need to grow this team to 130,000 strong in the next three months in order to qualify for the DNC 's fall and winter debates. This team isn't complete without you--will you consider a gift of $5 now and join us?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771637/691c9bd/6c2c8664/11a4ee1e/1521812549/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190531_RH_20190531-fr-RH-generosity-ndnr_ndnr_contribbutton&recurring=auto&amount=1&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=") From the bottom of my heart,
Robin Hickenlooper ****[](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771637/691c9bd/6c2c8664/11a4ee1e/1521812549/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190531_RH_20190531-fr-RH-generosity-ndnr_ndnr_contribbutton&recurring=auto&amount=1&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=") ****
---
| | Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020
---

PO Box 6377, Denver, CO 80206
Contributions or gifts to Hickenlooper 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, you can join the Hickenlooper 2020 team by **[_signing up right here_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771637/691c9bd/6c2c8664/11a4ee1f/1521812549/VEsC/ "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/join-in")**.
Keep us company on the campaign trail by joining us on [_**Facebook**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771637/691c9bd/6c2c8664/11a4ee1c/1521812549/VEsD/ "https://www.facebook.com/JohnHickenlooper/"), [_**Twitter**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771637/691c9bd/6c2c8664/11a4ee1d/1521812549/VEsA/ "https://twitter.com/hickenlooper"), [_**Instagram**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771637/691c9bd/6c2c8664/11a4ee1a/1521812549/VEsB/ "https://www.instagram.com/johnhickenlooper/"), and [_**YouTube**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771637/691c9bd/6c2c8664/11a4ee1b/1521812549/VEsO/ "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC82O0Byp_ny13O0LkO1UpUg/featured").
We love staying connected to you--but if at any point you'd like to opt out, you can do so right [here](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771637/691c9bd/6c2c8664/11a4ee18/1521812549/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").
If we're not reaching you at the correct email address, please [_**update your information here**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771637/691c9bd/6c2c8664/11a4ee1f/1521812549/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/join-in").

name: =?utf-8?q?Jen_O=E2=80=99Malley_Dillon=2C_Beto_for_America?=
subject: Important update to the rules
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Beto for America

We just got word from the DNC. To qualify for the next debates, each
candidate needs at least 400 donors state-by-state and a minimum of
130,000 donors in total.

We feel good about hitting those goals, but we want to be sure that we
exceed the minimum in every state and territory in the country. It looks
like you haven’t donated yet, so I have a quick question for you:

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17623?refcode=ema20190531-33750&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1007&akid=33750%2E444211%2ES9CTyF ]Can you help us secure Beto’s spot on the debate stage now? Donate $1
now to ensure we have 400+ donors in every single state and territory in
the country.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17623?refcode=ema20190531-33750&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1008&akid=33750%2E444211%2ES9CTyF ]Contribute $1 »

Even if you can only chip in a little bit, it still helps. Our strategy is
to start the work of securing as many donors as possible as early as
possible. That’s the only way to ensure our spot at the debates is secure.

All my best,

Jen O’Malley Dillon
Campaign Manager
Beto for America

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-for-america-emails?refcode=em20190531footer&t=1009&refcode2=33750_444211_S9CTyF&akid=33750%2E444211%2ES9CTyF

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1010&akid=33750%2E444211%2ES9CTyF

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

We'll get right to the point: we are facing a huge end-of-month finance deadline at midnight, and we still need **50 new grassroots contributions** to meet our campaign's fundraising goals.

name: Team Tomlinson
subject: Final day to achieve Founding Donor status!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/74264/images/tt2020%20email%20header.png]
Donate before midnight tonight, and become a Founding Donor of Teresa’s campaign [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt-eom?refcode=em053119-nd]

Dear Friend,

Tonight at midnight is Teresa’s first big fundraising challenge. The end of month fundraising deadline is important because it shows that Teresa is a serious contender to be Georgia’s next U.S. Senator. When our opponents see how many grassroots donors have joined Team Tomlinson – in just the first month – they’ll know they’re up for a real battle come Election Day.

Your donation matters, Friend, Teresa is relying on grassroots donors like you to power her campaign. Can you chip in just $3 today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt-eom?refcode=em053119-nd]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Express Donate $3 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt-eom?refcode=em053119-nd&amount=3&express_lane=true]
Express Donate $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt-eom?refcode=em053119-nd&amount=10&express_lane=true]
Express Donate $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt-eom?refcode=em053119-nd&amount=25&express_lane=true]
Express Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt-eom?refcode=em053119-nd&amount=50&express_lane=true]
Or, donate another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt-eom?refcode=em053119-nd]

The race to be Georgia’s next U.S. Senator could not be more important at this time in our nation’s history. The GOP’s war on women will affect hundreds of thousands of Georgians, and take our country back 50 years if we let them get away with it. The tide is turning to flip the Senate blue – but to do that, we have to win Georgia .

We need a leader like Teresa, who has a long track record of standing up to bullies to get things done for the people. Now she’s running for U.S. Senate because we need a new playbook in Washington--and someone willing to shatter the current dysfunctional system. But we can only win this election if everyone steps up and invests in a better future for our country.

Today is your last chance to become a Founding Donor for Teresa’s campaign for U.S. Senate. Chip in now and join our team. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt-eom?refcode=em053119-nd]

2020 is coming, and this could not be a more important race, for our state and our country. Together, we can show that Georgia is ready for something new – and that the people will not stand for the dysfunction and corruption we see every day from Washington.

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt-eom?refcode=em053119-nd&noskip=true]

Thank you,

Team Tomlinson
<<View this email in your browser.>> [https://teresatomlinson.com/final-day-to-achieve-founding-donor-status/]

name: Stefanie Conahan
subject: Before I sit down with KG
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand 2020
body:
It's deadline day, so I just wanted to check in really quickly.
| | |
---
Peter, it's deadline day, so I just wanted to check in really quickly:
I'm going to sit down with Kirsten in a few hours and go over our May fundraising numbers. We wanted to raise $125,000 this week to close out the month strong, and we're still falling a bit short.

name: MT
subject: critical moment
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress |
body:
Peter -- I hope I caught you before
you sign off for the weekend. My team just let me know we’re
still coming up short of our goal.

We need just 45 more supporters from Ankeny to chip in before midnight. Will you be one of them?
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mt-may19-eom
( https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mt-may19-eom?refcode=MT_EM_FR_90DO_190531_2_5&amount=15.00&firstname=%7B%7BFirstName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&lastname=%7B%7BLastName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr1=%7B%7BAddressLine1,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr2=%7B%7BAddressLine2,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&email=%7B%7BRecipientEmailAddress,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&zip=%7B%7BZipCode,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&city=%7B%7BCity,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&state=%7B%7BState,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&phone=%7B%7BPhoneNumber,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&occupation=%7B%7BOccupation,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&employer=%7B%7BEmployer,DefaultTo=%7D%7D )

name: Team Mackler
subject: Time is running out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James Mackler for U
body:
If we want to celebrate a James Mackler victory in November 2020, we have to win a lot of small victories first.
|
---
[ ](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa2a5/18d6a294/4a3f6fb9/26d69359/2876079721/VEsH/ "https://www.jamesmackler.com/")

| | If we want to celebrate a James Mackler victory in November 2020, we have to win a lot of small victories first. This is especially true since James isn't accepting corporate PAC money. To compete with billionaire-backed candidates, we can't miss a single fundraising goal. We need to be on our game, every month. Whether or not we're successful in making James the next Senator of Tennessee depends on the work we do from now until Election Day. [**_Will you help James build the momentum he needs? Our $30,000 May fundraising deadline is at midnight tonight. body:
| | |

[_**I 'm about to ask you for $15 before my monumental End of Month Deadline at midnight to help me meet the criteria for the next set of Democratic debates. But first, please let me explain why it's so important:**_](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcdc5/3eb3e2fc/40fba2db/744972de/296656249/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20190531_em_fr_b2_castro_all_rs_v1&recur_weekly=on&recurring=on&amount=25")

Growing up on the West Side of San Antonio, my family never had it easy.

The odds were stacked against us from the start.

My grandmother immigrated to this country as an orphan when she was 7. She cleaned houses to provide for us.

**She never could have imagined her grandson would one day run for President -- but that 's the American Dream for you. **

More than anything, I want to get to these next debates for my grandmother -- and for every struggling American who doesn't think they have anyone speaking for them.

I need 400 donors from Florida to qualify. Before my critical End of Month Deadline at midnight, will you chip in $15 to help me reach these next debates?

| [**Chip in $8 now >> **](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcdc5/3eb3e2fc/40fba2db/744972dd/296656249/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20190531_em_fr_b2_castro_all_rs_v1&recur_weekly=on&recurring=on&amount=8")

name: Team Maggie
subject: Jeanne Shaheen needs your help before tonight's deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi there,
We're about to ask you to support Sen. Shaheen's reelection campaign before tonight's May fundraising deadline. Before we do, we want to be crystal clear about what could happen if she falls short.
**Democrats cannot win back the Senate without winning in New Hampshire. Losing would mean giving the GOP Senate control for at least another two years.**
With Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump dead set on putting more ultraconservative justices on the Supreme Court, rolling back health care access and attacking our voting rights, we've got to protect vulnerable Democrats like Jeanne.
[**We told her we 'd help raise $5,000 for her campaign by midnight, and Jeanne is relying on your help to get there. Will you please give $3 or whatever you can right now?**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc2d2/2a380d31/395ffa2b/f12758/2378913727/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0Y2pzIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxOTA1MzFfMDUxNU1XSDRDSlM1LXJzX1JPIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4cjs?refcode=e20190531_0515MWH4CJS5-rs_RO&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")

clean_body: Hi there, We're about to ask you to support Sen. Shaheen's reelection campaign before tonight's May fundraising deadline. Before we do, we want to be crystal clear about what could happen if she falls short. Democrats cannot win back the Senate without winning in New Hampshire. Losing would mean giving the GOP Senate control for at least another two years. With Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump dead set on putting more ultraconservative justices on the Supreme Court, rolling back health care access and attacking our voting rights, we've got to protect vulnerable Democrats like Jeanne. "" If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will automatically be split between Jeanne Shaheen and Maggie Hassan. "" "" "" "" Thanks for doing your part, Team Maggie "" _

name: Team Durbin
subject: This is important, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
We wanted to make sure you saw Senator Durbin's message about our critical fundraising deadline. We're close to meeting our goal, but we still need more folks like you to take the next step and contribute before midnight to ensure we are ready to take back the Senate in 2020.
**[Pitch in $5, or whatever you can, before the deadline to help us reach our goal.](http://action.dickdurbin. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-may-2019-eom?refcode=em190531&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
**[CONTRIBUTE](http://action.dickdurbin. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-may-2019-eom?refcode=em190531&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
\---Original Message from Senator Durbin---
[**Help win the fight for a Democratic Senate. Contribute $5 before the deadline.**](http://action.dickdurbin. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-may-2019-eom?refcode=em190531&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
Peter,
We know how urgent it is that we defeat President Trump in 2020, but we can't stop there.
In order to end this era of Republican obstruction and finally start making progress for the American people, we must elect a Democratic majority in the Senate.
I'm working hard to make that happen, but I need your support. Our end-of-month fundraising deadline is almost here, and we need everyone to help us meet our goals.
[**To win back the Senate in 2020, we must start working now to ensure we have the resources for victory. Can you stand with me and pitch in $5 before the deadline?**](http://action.dickdurbin. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-may-2019-eom?refcode=em190531&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
We can't take anything for granted, Peter. We know the Republicans will fight tooth and nail to take back the House, keep the Senate, and re-elect President Trump.
If they succeed, that will spell the end of affordable health care. It will be a disaster for our efforts to fight climate change. Women's rights will still be on the line for years to come.
But we have the power to fight back. Not only can we elect a new President, but also take back the Senate so we can start to undo President Trump's damage and move our country forward.
[**Together, we can ensure Democrats take back the Senate in 2020. Join me in the fight and contribute $5 now before our crucial end-of-month fundraising deadline.**](http://action.dickdurbin. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-may-2019-eom?refcode=em190531&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
My best,
Dick Durbin
**[CONTRIBUTE](http://action.dickdurbin. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-may-2019-eom?refcode=em190531&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

* * *
Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Should you want to unsubscribe, you can [click here](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4cbc/42ab3cf4/63437eb9/135d6d02/3646894623/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). Join Senator Durbin in taking on powerful special interests on behalf of hard-working middle class families by [making a contribution to our campaign here.](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4cbc/42ab3cf4/63437eb9/135d6d03/3646894623/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/durbin_footer")
Friends of Dick Durbin
Attn: Online Department
101 W. Grand, Suite 200
Chicago, IL 60654

body:
| | | [**"Like most Americans, I do not accept that our economy and our politics are too broken to fix."**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba2b3/134673f2/2886d5d/6996f989/3006918211/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emaildebate?refcode=EM_FR_B1_053119_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500")

Team,

Michael had a good night, last night. In fact, he had a GREAT night at his CNN Town Hall!

Across the country, there's a positive buzz growing about Michael's strong and engaging answers during yesterday's CNN Town Hall. Michael made an impression -- and it's already leading to a surge of interest and support.

[**But team, we need help from top supporters like you to keep this up.**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba2b3/134673f2/2886d5d/6996f989/3006918211/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emaildebate?refcode=EM_FR_B1_053119_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500")

As Michael said last night, it's time to build opportunity for every American and restore integrity to our government. We need ambitious solutions to our country's greatest challenges.
---

As Michael travels from community to community, listening to your concerns, and sharing how he believes we can spur greater opportunity for everyone, [**it 's critical we have the resources to compete in a crowded space.**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba2b3/134673f2/2886d5d/6996f989/3006918211/VEsHBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emaildebate?refcode=EM_FR_B1_053119_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500")

We have the momentum, and we need to keep it building.**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba2b3/134673f2/2886d5d/6996f989/3006918211/VEsHBw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emaildebate?refcode=EM_FR_B1_053119_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500")

name: Team Joe
subject: Donald Trump came after us -- and you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Early this morning, his campaign sent an email to his supporters instructing them to outraise us. He called our supporters "low energy donors." | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/29319400/1cd0ac28/23ae10ec/356c9654/1609270975/VEsH/ "https://www.joebiden.com")
---
Peter --

This is a big moment for us. Tonight marks the end of our first full month as a campaign. And already, Donald Trump has repeatedly attacked us -- and our supporters like you.

Early this morning, his campaign sent an email to his supporters instructing them to outraise us. He called our supporters "low energy donors." **And he said he wants to "CRUSH" us and show where "true American Patriots stand."**

Make no mistake -- Donald Trump is going to use our fundraising numbers to determine the strength of our campaign. It's not fair, and it's not right.

But Peter, that's why we keep sending you these emails. If we can hit our fundraising goals, we can compete with Trump every step of the way. **Tonight is our May fundraising deadline, and we still need 550 more donations to hit our goal. Can you chip in to make sure we don 't fall short?** | | [**DONATE $5 >>**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/29319400/1cd0ac28/23ae10ec/356c9653/1609270975/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q22019?refcode=email-bsd-20190531rapid-b3_FDR_sendwide_NA-F1_S1_C2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=20190531rapid&utm_content=b3_FDR_sendwide_NA&utm_term=F1_S1_C2&amount=5")

name: Seth Moulton
subject: Let’s solve the mental health crisis together
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for America
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/7181326/67169776/-1369401587?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGNkMzY2Zi1mODgzLWU5MTEtYWJjNC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x0JCnb32QTwla_tOvDxCTc2cznS8J9Jyr7F7XpJbwcc=) Friend, We have a mental health crisis in this country. More than 8 million veterans and civilians suffer from post-traumatic stress (PTS). 50% of those don’t seek help, and 22 veterans and active duty service members take their own lives every day. It’s time to end the stigma around mental health and help everyone get the help they need. On Tuesday, I spoke publicly for the first time about my own experience with PTS after my four tours in Iraq. I must admit that I had trouble talking about it, but one of the first things I learned in the Marines is that if you’re going to lead, you have to lead by example. And if I’m applying for the most important leadership position in the world, I had better lead by example on one of the issues that matters most to me in the world. That’s why I’m sharing my story for the first time, and helping share the stories of other courageous veterans who have dealt with similar issues: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/7181327/67169777/1617635432?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGNkMzY2Zi1mODgzLWU5MTEtYWJjNC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x0JCnb32QTwla_tOvDxCTc2cznS8J9Jyr7F7XpJbwcc=) Earlier this week, I released [my plan to expand mental health services to veterans and civilians across the country](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/7181328/67169778/-1515170486?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGNkMzY2Zi1mODgzLWU5MTEtYWJjNC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x0JCnb32QTwla_tOvDxCTc2cznS8J9Jyr7F7XpJbwcc=). **The plan will:**
* Increase mental health checkups for active duty military AND veterans
* Fund yearly mental health screenings for ALL high schoolers
* Establish a “511” National Mental Health Crisis Hotline

Friend, the mental well-being of all Americans--especially those who’ve served our country and struggle with re-entering civilian life once they come home--is one of the most important issues to me. We need our leaders to talk about mental health in a serious way, and we need to make sure all Americans get the care they deserve. It will make us a healthier, stronger country. That’s what we’re fighting for with this plan, and it’s part of why I’m in this race. Thank you for standing with me, Seth | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/7181329/67169779/1848844371?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGNkMzY2Zi1mODgzLWU5MTEtYWJjNC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x0JCnb32QTwla_tOvDxCTc2cznS8J9Jyr7F7XpJbwcc=) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/7181330/67169780/-1745464800?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGNkMzY2Zi1mODgzLWU5MTEtYWJjNC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x0JCnb32QTwla_tOvDxCTc2cznS8J9Jyr7F7XpJbwcc=) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/7181331/67169781/341442065?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGNkMzY2Zi1mODgzLWU5MTEtYWJjNC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x0JCnb32QTwla_tOvDxCTc2cznS8J9Jyr7F7XpJbwcc=&hl=en) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/7181332/67169782/-368236352?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGNkMzY2Zi1mODgzLWU5MTEtYWJjNC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x0JCnb32QTwla_tOvDxCTc2cznS8J9Jyr7F7XpJbwcc=)

More than 8 million veterans and civilians suffer from post-traumatic stress (PTS). 50% of those don’t seek help, and 22 veterans and active duty service members take their own lives every day. It’s time to end the stigma around mental health and help everyone get the help they need. subject: Who’s Running for Mayor?
body:
As the temperature starts to heat up across Indiana, there’s no question that the unofficial summer season has made its way to Indiana. But the... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/whos-running-for-mayor?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
| _**Who's Running for Mayor?**_
As the temperature starts to heat up across the state, there’s no question that the unofficial summer season has made its way to Indiana. But the temperature isn’t the only thing heating up. In communities across our state (likely including yours), this year we have critical mayor’s races, city and town council races, and clerk-treasurer races that are red-hot.

And not only are these races red-hot, but it’s local races like this that have the biggest impact on your day-to-day life. Your mayor, for example, is responsible for critical issues like infrastructure, public safety and quality of place. Don’t you think it’s critical that we have top-notch Republicans in office at the local level handling these important issues?

This summer season, I encourage you to get involved in the local races in your community. Consider volunteering at the county fair or local festival for your candidate, or perhaps go door-to-door telling your neighbors why it’s important to elect Republicans not just in national and statewide elections, but also in our local elections like we have this fall. Not sure how to get involved? Reach out to your local Republican Party chair (you can find [contact info here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=5a36e05870&e=1acd9bb3d6)), or just respond to this email and we’ll work to connect you to your local party leaders and candidates.

Or, if you’re a candidate yourself this year (or considering being a candidate next year), now’s the time to register for a [special candidate training seminar](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=3a9431ab04&e=1acd9bb3d6), “Battleground Indiana: Winning Indiana’s Cities & Towns,” that we have planned in June. You can learn more about it [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b92305c70a&e=1acd9bb3d6).

It’s heating up, and there’s never been a better time to get involved. So pick up your phone (or email!) and reach out to your local Republican leaders now to ask two important questions – “Who’s running for mayor?” and “How can I get involved?”
-Kyle Hupfer
---
|
---
| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was **
---
|
---
| **_Protecting Hoosier Children_** This week, **Governor Eric Holcomb** held ceremonial bill signings for several important bills. He welcomed the Hoosier advocates and lawmakers who helped make these new laws possible to the Governor’s Office for the signings. This includes two big bills that will help protect our Hoosier children, both from potential predators and from reckless drivers.
* **Senate Enrolled Act 551 ****– ** allows parents to seek a protective order on behalf of a child against someone who has engaged in sexually suggestive or abusive activity. The legislation also restricts disclosure of sensitive information about victims of child abuse and addresses a gap in the current kidnapping and criminal confinement laws. Read more about this new law [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e821145e86&e=1acd9bb3d6).
* **Senate Enrolled Act 2 – **helps keep Hoosier students safer near school bus stops. Following the terrible tragedy last year that took the lives of three siblings crossing the road to board a school bus in Fulton County, this new law increases criminal penalties for drivers who disregard flashing red lights and stop arms on school buses. Read more about this new law [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=3b9f9ac295&e=1acd9bb3d6).

Thank you, **Governor Holcomb** , for your commitment to keeping our next generation safe!
---
| |
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=4eee87498f&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| **_Battleground Indiana: Winning Indiana's Cities and Towns_** Attention, 2019 municipal candidates and potential 2020 candidates! This June, we have [a big training event planned for you](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=30784c69a1&e=1acd9bb3d6), and it’s designed to help you build the skills you and your campaign team will need in order to cross the finish line FIRST on Election Night!

[RSVP now](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=3e92fe030f&e=1acd9bb3d6) to secure your spot so you can learn more about fundraising, recruiting volunteers, communicating with voters and more! [Your registration](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=418551f812&e=1acd9bb3d6) will include everything that you will need for the day – including admission to a reception with **Governor Holcomb **and **Indiana GOP Chairman Kyle Hupfer** that evening.

Together, we can ensure that Republicans continue to deliver results for Hoosiers in cities and towns across Indiana!
---
|
---
| **_Upcoming Republican Events_** [June 7](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=3ba0fb2520&e=1acd9bb3d6): Franklin Township Lincoln Day Dinner
[June 13](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=29d4963fd8&e=1acd9bb3d6): 2019 Southern Indiana Republican Invitational Golf Tournament ****Have an upcoming Republican event not listed here? Let us know at [info@indiana.go](mailto:info@indiana.go)[p](mailto:info@indiana.go)! ****

**Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch **[awarded eight planning grants](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a52dceaef0&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Auditor Tera Klutz **[remembers those who made sacrifices on Memorial Day](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=183b6fa8e1&e=1acd9bb3d6)

**Senator Todd Young**[spoke in South Bend about moving the smoking age to 21](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=25748e28c7&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Senator Mike Braun **[toured Elkhart County RV manufacturing facility ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e789ec7728&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congresswoman Jackie Walorski **[seeks to help tornado victims](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ea9b38a6f6&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Jim Banks** [met with Naval Hospital Bremerton staff](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=fd94875322&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Jim Baird** [is helping preserve history by recording veteran stories](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=9919abdc4e&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congresswoman Susan Brooks **[recognizes selfless work of servicewoman](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=8f97c84dbd&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Greg Pence** [talks about first term on Capitol Hill](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ab808a3fb9&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Larry Buchson** [greets local veterans at WWII memorial](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ff848acb83&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Trey Hollingsworth **[thanks our firefighters for answering the call](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=75645bb77f&e=1acd9bb3d6)

name: ElizabethWarren.com
subject: So close!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
We only have until midnight to get our budget in the best possible shape for June, when the first presidential primary debates will begin. If you can, help our campaign keep fighting: | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852e5e1/45c30650/962a41df/669877b9/1996086915/VEsH/ "https://elizabethwarren.com/")
---
Here's some great news: We're _so close_ to hitting our May fundraising goal.

The deadline is coming right up, and based on the rate of contributions in the past couple of hours, we just need a few more people to chip in and we'll reach our goal!

**[Can you chip in right now to help hit our goal before midnight? You could be the one that helps our campaign reach our goal!](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852e5e1/45c30650/962a41df/669877b8/1996086915/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW1heTE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IjIwMTkwNTMxZW0yLWZ1bGwifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-may19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190531em2-full")**

We only have until midnight to get our budget in the best possible shape for June, when the first presidential primary debates will begin.

Hitting our May fundraising goal will make it possible to reach more people with Elizabeth's message, grow our team on the ground, and expand our movement.

**It'll also help make it clear that people in Pennsylvania and all over the country support Elizabeth 's bold ideas for big, structural change.

[We wouldn't ask you to chip in today if it weren't important. name: Team Tomlinson
subject: Last chance to become a Founding Donor!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE
body:
Friend – Teresa’s end-of-month deadline is just 4 hours away – and this is your last chance to become a Founding Donor. Help us meet our goal, and join the supporters who are making Teresa’s historic campaign to turn Georgia’s senate seat blue possible.

To become a Founding Donor, chip in just $3 now to help us reach our goal. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt-eom?refcode=em053119-nd2]

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt-eom?refcode=em053119-nd2&noskip=true]

Thank you,
Team Tomlinson
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Sender: Team Tomlinson,
Subject: Final day to achieve Founding Donor status!

Donate before midnight tonight, and become a Founding Donor of Teresa’s campaign [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt-eom?refcode=em053119-nd2]

Dear Friend,

Tonight at midnight is Teresa’s first big fundraising challenge. The end of month fundraising deadline is important because it shows that Teresa is a serious contender to be Georgia’s next U.S. Senator. When our opponents see how many grassroots donors have joined Team Tomlinson – in just the first month – they’ll know they’re up for a real battle come Election Day.

Your donation matters, Friend. Teresa is relying on grassroots donors like you to power her campaign. Can you chip in just $3 today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt-eom?refcode=em053119-nd2]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Express Donate $3 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt-eom?refcode=em053119-nd2&amount=3&express_lane=true]
Express Donate $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt-eom?refcode=em053119-nd2&amount=10&express_lane=true]
Express Donate $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt-eom?refcode=em053119-nd2&amount=25&express_lane=true]
Express Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt-eom?refcode=em053119-nd2&amount=50&express_lane=true]
Or, donate another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt-eom?refcode=em053119-nd2]

The race to be Georgia’s next U.S. Senator could not be more important at this time in our nation’s history. The GOP’s war on women will affect hundreds of thousands of Georgians, and take our country back 50 years if we let them get away with it. The tide is turning to flip the Senate blue – but to do that, we have to win Georgia.

We need a leader like Teresa, who has a long track record of standing up to bullies to get things done for the people. Now she’s running for U.S. Senate because we need a new playbook in Washington – and someone willing to shatter the current dysfunctional system. But we can only win this election if everyone steps up and invests in a better future for our country.

Today is your last chance to become a Founding Donor for Teresa’s campaign for U.S. Senate. Chip in now and join our team. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt-eom?refcode=em053119-nd2]

2020 is coming, and this could not be a more important race, for our state and our country. Together, we can show that Georgia is ready for something new – and that the people will not stand for the dysfunction and corruption we see every day from Washington.

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt-eom?refcode=em053119-nd2&noskip=true]

Thank you,
Team Tomlinson
<<View this email in your browser.>> [https://teresatomlinson.com/final-day-to-achieve-founding-donor-status/]

name: Dan Baer
subject: I'll make this brief
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan for Colorado
body:
Trust me: We need your $19 today. It goes so much further than you think.
|
---

| | I'm about to ask you to chip in to my campaign. (And to those of you who have given -- some of you several times -- thank you!)

_**I want to explain why grassroots donations are so important -- and how they truly make the difference.**_

My opponent and other Republican Senators are already stockpiling millions from special interests and corporate PACs. We want our campaign to be different.

We must have the resources to win -- and grassroots donors are what allow us to win the right way. When folks chip in what they can online, it means less time for me in an office making phone calls, and more time out driving around Colorado, listening to Coloradans, and learning about their needs. That way we have a campaign built around people.

Cory Gardner and his special interest allies will dump millions in attacks into the race -- but with your help, we'll be talking about the things that can make people's lives better. We'll greet their cynicism with defiant optimism about the possibility for progress.

Your donation today will put gas in our pickup to meet more voters. It will help us pay for parade signs and placards, and prepare campaign shirts, buttons, stickers for you to buy (stay tuned!). It will even fund the outreach that we're using to build this grassroots movement.
[**Trust me: We need your $19 today. It goes so much further than you think. Thank you for your support, and know that every single dollar truly means so much to me. >>**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb826d9/232dfd1/9412c08/62a178ec/1985110366/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190531_em_fr_b2_baer_all&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")

Dan

---
|
---

Dan for Colorado
PO Box 1199
Denver, CO 80201

name: Faiz Shakir
subject: I am asking you directly:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2020
body:
There's only one way that we will win.
# [](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/8915?t=1&akid=1523%2E150750%2EZnXxPl)

Friends -
I am writing you today to ask you to make a contribution to our campaign before a monthly fundraising deadline we’ve set for our campaign ends at midnight.
Here is why I ask: We have an incredible amount of work ahead of us and the fight ahead will not be easy.
We are taking on powerful corporations and individuals who will spend obscene amounts of money to stop our campaign.
In order to take them on and win, our campaign is relying on lots of people contributing what they can.
So before our monthly fundraising deadline at midnight tonight, I need to ask:
[**Will you make a $3 contribution to our campaign today? It is important that we meet our monthly fundraising goal to stay on track to win.**](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/11505?refcode=em190531-2-v2-ndon-no-el&t=26&akid=1523%2E150750%2EZnXxPl)
Usually when a person runs for president, they spend a good portion of their time asking rich people for money. You will likely not be surprised to hear that is not what Bernie is going to do.
That is why your contribution is so important to our campaign. Thank you for adding one today.
In solidarity,
Faiz Shakir
Campaign Manager
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/11505?refcode=em190531-2-v2-ndon-button&t=27&akid=1523%2E150750%2EZnXxPl)

Paid for by Bernie 2020
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com**. If you need to, [**unsubscribe here**](https://bernie.actionkit.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=28&akid=1523%2E150750%2EZnXxPl). You can also [sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/fewer-emails/?t=29&akid=1523%2E150750%2EZnXxPl). We hope you'll stay, because emails are such an important part of how we organize and how we raise money. In fact, there is no single greater source for our campaign's fundraising than emails like this one. And that's important, because no one person, not even Bernie Sanders, can take on Trump and the billionaire class alone.

Before you go about the rest of your day, help power our fight against the billionaire class by [making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-email-template?refcode=em-footer&t=30&refcode2=1523_150750_ZnXxPl&akid=1523%2E150750%2EZnXxPl).
Submit this form to [update your contact information](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/update-info/?t=31&akid=1523%2E150750%2EZnXxPl).

name: KG
subject: Two sentences
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand 2020
body:
The outpouring of support for reproductive rights over the past month has been a powerful reminder that advocating fearlessly for the issues that matter will always inspire others to action.
Peter, the outpouring of support for reproductive rights over the past month has been a powerful reminder that advocating fearlessly for the issues that matter will always inspire others to action. **[I want to be able to continue that advocacy from the Democratic debate stage in just a few weeks, but I still need to guarantee my spot by hitting the 65,000-donor goal--will you make a donation of any amount right now to become one of the donors I need to get there?](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f9774ba/2ae112ef/6951974c/357c9722/3653512461/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azMxNDQtZnItZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk3144-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thanks,
Kirsten

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: re: tonight’s important goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger For Congress
body:
My finance director, Whitney, sent an email to you this afternoon. (I've forwarded it below for your convenience.)
| | Peter,

My finance director, Whitney, sent an email to you this afternoon. (I've forwarded it below for your convenience.)

We have a really expensive race ahead of us, and the grassroots support you've provided so far this year will help us hold our own against the extreme outside groups trying to buy back our district.

**We need to work together to secure the kind of representation Central Virginia families deserve in Congress --** ****[which is why I'm asking one last time if you can chip in and help us raise the last few hundred dollars of our May goal. >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/wq_bUyxoRCUUPnMRgCMzmU35Kjcky-Y6e5xQp2SFbCI=/UEhkDvCLoG_ozhpIFP-sR5j_sWEl7TuIUyMTOJEWTBc=?refcode=em_fr_2019.05.31_b2_as_all&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,1000,2800)****

Here's the link you can use to rush a donation: ****[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/spanbergerq22019](https://act.myngp.com/el/wq_bUyxoRCUUPnMRgCMzmU35Kjcky-Y6e5xQp2SFbCI=/UEhkDvCLoG_ozhpIFP-sR5j_sWEl7TuIUyMTOJEWTBc=?refcode=em_fr_2019.05.31_b2_as_all&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,1000,2800)**** We're just **$736** away, Peter. Will you be the one that pushes us over the top to reach our goal?

I know I say it a lot, but thanks again.

_\-- Abigail_

\-----forwarded message-----
From: **Whitney Holt**
Date: Fri, May 31, 2019 at 1:16 PM
Subject: a few seconds Hi team,

You might have noticed you've been receiving more emails than usual from our campaign over the past few days.

I hate to add to the noise in your inbox, but I wouldn't be doing my job as Abigail's Finance Director if I didn't reach out on the last day -- _today!_ \-- of our May fundraising period. ****[That's why I'm asking you directly: Please, can you support us ahead of tonight's deadline? We only have $1,267 left to raise, and I know if you can step up with a donation of any size, we'll reach our May goal. >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/wq_bUyxoRCUUPnMRgCMzmU35Kjcky-Y6e5xQp2SFbCI=/UEhkDvCLoG_ozhpIFP-sR5j_sWEl7TuIUyMTOJEWTBc=?refcode=em_fr_2019.05.31_b2_as_all&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,1000,2800)**** | ******[CONTRIBUTE »](https://act.myngp.com/el/wq_bUyxoRCUUPnMRgCMzmU35Kjcky-Y6e5xQp2SFbCI=/UEhkDvCLoG_ozhpIFP-sR5j_sWEl7TuIUyMTOJEWTBc=?refcode=em_fr_2019.05.31_b2_as_all&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,1000,2800)******
---
It's critical that we end May with a fundraising number that reflects the hard work we've already put into Abigail's competitive re-election campaign, and that prepares us for the tough tests we'll face on the road ahead.

Month after month, we've met our targets because members of this grassroots network have pitched in their hard-earned $5, $25, and $50.

Those resources will be indispensable as attacks on Abigail from Super PACs and special interests increase.

Unfortunately, the costs associated with running a campaign -- everything from hiring field organizers, to ordering yard signs, and getting our ads on the air -- are _high_. **So, quite literally, we can 't afford to fall short on our fundraising goals.**

****[I'm doing all I can to prepare us for our expensive toss-up race by making sure we hit tonight's goal, but I need your help. Friends, please consider chipping in a few dollars before you close this email. >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/wq_bUyxoRCUUPnMRgCMzmU35Kjcky-Y6e5xQp2SFbCI=/UEhkDvCLoG_ozhpIFP-sR5j_sWEl7TuIUyMTOJEWTBc=?refcode=em_fr_2019.05.31_b2_as_all&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,1000,2800)****
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $15>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/wq_bUyxoRCUUPnMRgCMzmU35Kjcky-Y6e5xQp2SFbCI=/UEhkDvCLoG_ozhpIFP-sR5j_sWEl7TuIUyMTOJEWTBc=?refcode=em_fr_2019.05.31_b2_as_all&amount=15&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,1000,2800)**
**[Express donate $25>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/wq_bUyxoRCUUPnMRgCMzmU35Kjcky-Y6e5xQp2SFbCI=/UEhkDvCLoG_ozhpIFP-sR5j_sWEl7TuIUyMTOJEWTBc=?refcode=em_fr_2019.05.31_b2_as_all&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,1000,2800)**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/wq_bUyxoRCUUPnMRgCMzmU35Kjcky-Y6e5xQp2SFbCI=/UEhkDvCLoG_ozhpIFP-sR5j_sWEl7TuIUyMTOJEWTBc=?refcode=em_fr_2019.05.31_b2_as_all&amount=50&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,1000,2800)**
**[Express donate $100>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/wq_bUyxoRCUUPnMRgCMzmU35Kjcky-Y6e5xQp2SFbCI=/UEhkDvCLoG_ozhpIFP-sR5j_sWEl7TuIUyMTOJEWTBc=?refcode=em_fr_2019.05.31_b2_as_all&amount=100&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,1000,2800)**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/wq_bUyxoRCUUPnMRgCMzmU35Kjcky-Y6e5xQp2SFbCI=/UEhkDvCLoG_ozhpIFP-sR5j_sWEl7TuIUyMTOJEWTBc=?refcode=em_fr_2019.05.31_b2_as_all&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,1000,2800)**
I know your time is valuable, so this shouldn't take more than a few seconds. Thanks for all of your hard work.

Whitney Holt
Finance Director
Abigail Spanberger for Congress

| Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative for Virginia's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/wq_bUyxoRCUUPnMRgCMzmU35Kjcky-Y6e5xQp2SFbCI=/wH2HSih1_QvcO6ZeVcuLzA2XZAyNn-rcIysBIsfvyKs=)

If you'd only like to receive our most important email updates, you may [click here](https://act.myngp.com/el/wq_bUyxoRCUUPnMRgCMzmU35Kjcky-Y6e5xQp2SFbCI=/Qbbgj7deQc6-CPo_oDqiTxR6ygl-y3Lqyc6FL_1lGbs=) to request fewer emails from Abigail's campaign.

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/wq_bUyxoRCUUPnMRgCMzmU35Kjcky-Y6e5xQp2SFbCI=/F5RaPFPWKwNrQUaazZsmNHnm7GKStU6XfyRun-xL0Ng=).

Spanberger For Congress
PO Box 3121
Glen Allen, VA 23058

body:

| | You've heard from everyone under the sun:

\-- Julian's mom, Rosie
\-- Julian's wife, Erica
\-- Julian brother, Joaquin

Because tonight is the most important deadline we've faced yet in this race!

After qualifying for the first debates, everyone is watching to see if Julian has what it takes to build a lasting campaign operation. Tonight's End of Month Deadline is the first test. **And we 'll be honest: We're behind on tonight's fundraising goal.**

We want to give Julian a chance to show America that no matter where you come from or what family you're born into, **_you can be President too._**

Can Julian count on you to fill the gap in his fundraising before midnight? name: Team Kamala
subject: RE: our goals for May
body:
With just a few hours left until tonight’s important end-of-month
deadline, we’re all hands on deck here at HQ working to make sure we hit
our $500,000 fundraising goal by midnight.

It’s a tough but necessary goal to reach -- and our finance reports show
that we’re falling behind.

That’s why we’re reaching out for your help. When we say this is a
grassroots movement, we mean it -- the strongest movements are built by
their supporters and leaders on the ground.

Can we count on you to pitch in your
first contribution before tonight’s midnight deadline? Your
help does more than you know to strengthen our campaign.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190531-eom?refcode=ema190531-eom19-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&express_lane=true&t=1001&refcode2=5216_5755789_cFsfkz&akid=5216%2E5755789%2EcFsfkz ]Chip in $5 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190531-eom?refcode=ema190531-eom19-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=25&express_lane=true&t=1002&refcode2=5216_5755789_cFsfkz&akid=5216%2E5755789%2EcFsfkz ]Chip in $25 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190531-eom?refcode=ema190531-eom19-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=50&express_lane=true&t=1003&refcode2=5216_5755789_cFsfkz&akid=5216%2E5755789%2EcFsfkz ]Chip in $50 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190531-eom?refcode=ema190531-eom19-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=100&express_lane=true&t=1004&refcode2=5216_5755789_cFsfkz&akid=5216%2E5755789%2EcFsfkz ]Chip in $100 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190531-eom?refcode=ema190531-eom19-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=250&express_lane=true&t=1005&refcode2=5216_5755789_cFsfkz&akid=5216%2E5755789%2EcFsfkz ]Chip in $250 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190531-eom?refcode=ema190531-eom19-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&t=1006&refcode2=5216_5755789_cFsfkz&akid=5216%2E5755789%2EcFsfkz ]Another Amount

Here’s the truth: this isn’t just about getting ahead on our fundraising
goals. It’s about staffing up and funding our field offices; organizing
new events so Kamala can personally meet with and hear from voters; and
amplifying our message from coast to coast.

When Kamala takes the stage of the first debate of this presidential
primary next month, we want every grassroots supporter who pitched into
our campaign to know they helped her get there.

So we’re asking: will you help our campaign get ahead? It might not seem
like much, but getting Kamala to every campaign stop in this country
starts right here:

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190531-eom?refcode=ema190531-eom19-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&express_lane=true&t=1007&refcode2=5216_5755789_cFsfkz&akid=5216%2E5755789%2EcFsfkz ]Chip in $5 now

body:

body:
| |
---
| Friend,

The team just updated me on our fundraising deadline. I'm grateful for how friends and supporters like you are stepping up in a big way to make sure we hit our target.

With only a few hours left, we still need 950 more donations to get there.

Can you chip in before it's too late? [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may19-eom**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba2ae/134673f2/2817852/6996f909/3349926271/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may19-eom?refcode=EM_FR_B3_053119_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500")

Your support right now keeps fueling our people-powered campaign. It allows us to get out our message to voters in key states over the coming weeks and months.

And, it sends a clear signal we have the strength, the grassroots support, resources, and resolve to win the Democratic nomination and take on President Trump.

Thanks,

Michael

Peter, updating this and bumping it to the top of your inbox. [We are now less than 100 donations away from hitting our goal before our midnight deadline.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931941d/1cd0ac28/23fa50e2/356c9427/3604453213/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q22019?refcode=email-bsd-20190531fwd-b4_FDR_ac_NA-F1_S1_C1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=20190531fwd&utm_content=b4_FDR_ac_NA&utm_term=F1_S1_C1&amount=25")

_Original message_

[Peter, our fundraising team just reported that we're in the final 1,000 donation homestretch! Can you chip in before our midnight deadline?](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931941d/1cd0ac28/23fa50e2/356c9427/3604453213/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q22019?refcode=email-bsd-20190531fwd-b4_FDR_ac_NA-F1_S1_C1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=20190531fwd&utm_content=b4_FDR_ac_NA&utm_term=F1_S1_C1&amount=25")

Believe it or not, I dislike sending these fundraising pleas as much as you dislike reading them, but it's necessary to get the job done.

You see, the boss is counting on us to make sure we can keep this campaign running. And we're not accepting money from corporate PACs, only people.

**Can we count on you to step up for our supporters from Pennsylvania? We can reach 1,000 more donations by midnight tonight if we all dig deep, Peter:**

name: Tina Smith
subject: We're still short
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Everything is on the line right now.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-may?refcode=rtw_20190531_em-2&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") 6 hours left to hit our end-of-month goal, and we're still $4,568.05 short. **Rush an urgent contribution now >>** **[DONATE](https://action.tinaforminnesota. Right-wing super PACs have already spent tens of thousands in attack ads against me. Donald Trump and Mike Pence both visited Minnesota to motivate the Tea Party base. And we know they have record-breaking fundraising hauls ready to spend against me at any moment. **If we 're going to have any hope of taking back the Senate, we must win this race -- and I can't do it without your support. [We're still $4,568.05 short of our May fundraising goal, but if everyone reading this chips in just a few dollars right now, we'll hit it. Can I count on you to rush a contribution?](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-may?refcode=rtw_20190531_em-2&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")** **[DONATE](https://action.tinaforminnesota. name: Booker HQ
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Team: We just updated the numbers, and we're just $19,802 away from our monthly fundraising goal with just hours until midnight. This deadline matters, for two big reasons. When we flip the calendar to next month, we want to go big. That's why our state directors across the country are eagerly waiting on word from our budget team on whether they can make the investments they requested -- more staff, more offices, more materials, more of Cory's time. Our campaign rejects money from corporate PACs and D.C. lobbyists. The only way we build this is with support from people like you. **And now that the DNC has announced that any candidate who doesn 't reach 130,000 individual donors will be dropped from the debate stage, we can't afford to come up short at fundraising deadlines.** [_**Just $1 right now before our midnight deadline will help make sure Cory 's on that stage. Will you chip in?**_](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc093e/5fca0d19/35eb699/291b70f3/2704682290/VEsE/ "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190531-em?refcode=em_fr_20190531_BHQ_20190531-fr-BHQ-eom2.5-actives_2020ndnr_l1") Thank you, Team Cory
[](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc093e/5fca0d19/35eb699/291b70f2/2704682290/VEsF/ "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190531-em?refcode=em_fr_20190531_BHQ_20190531-fr-BHQ-eom2.5-actives_actives_contribbutton")

This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc093e/5fca0d19/35eb699/291b70f0/2704682290/VEsD/ "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc093e/5fca0d19/35eb699/291b70ff/2704682290/VEsA/ "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc093e/5fca0d19/35eb699/291b70fe/2704682290/VEsB/ "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc093e/5fca0d19/35eb699/291b70fd/2704682290/VEsO/ "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: Three big updates:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020
body:
I want to talk to you about some game changers for our campaign this week. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771634/691c9bd/6c2183e9/11a4ec26/3951206825/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_template")
---
| Friend, before I ask you for help [**_meeting our May fundraising goal before midnight_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771634/691c9bd/6c2183e9/11a4ec27/3951206825/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190531_JH_20190531-fr-JH-threeupdates-ndnr_ndnr_b1&recurring=auto&amount=1&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=") I want to talk to you about some game changers for our campaign this week:
* **NRA TV went on the attack, criticizing my calls for a national gun licensing standard.** The NRA is lashing out because they know we can beat them, like we already have in Colorado--passing universal background checks and high-capacity magazine limits. (My message for them: We're not going anywhere, and we won't stand down.)

* **I released my plan to protect women 's reproductive rights across our nation** by making Colorado's successful long-acting reversible contraception (LARC) program national. This would protect the rights of all women to control their own healthcare and bodies by providing access to affordable contraceptive options such as IUDs. (In Colorado, the results spoke for themselves: We saw a 64% drop in teenage abortion, a 54% drop in teen pregnancy, _and_ the program saved taxpayers $70 million.)

* **I went on the record calling for impeachment inquiry:** Robert Mueller's press conference on Wednesday convinced me that it's time for Congress to fulfill its constitutional duty to further the investigation.

Week by week, we're growing this campaign and getting our message out, everywhere from local meet and greets to national outlets like CNN and MSNBC. Our vision of an America united behind smart, humane, progressive policies is gaining traction.

**But one more game changer hit our campaign this week. The DNC doubled the number of individual grassroots donors it will take to qualify for the later debates: from 65,000 to 130,000.**

Hitting that goal and taking our message to the debate stage to speak up for gun safety, reproductive rights, and more will take _everyone_ on this team stepping up. The finance team tells me we're still over $20,000 from the goal we needed to hit by tonight, so I'm here to personally ask you:

**Before tonight 's deadline, will you consider making your first gift to our campaign? Just $1 is all it takes to help grow this team:** **[](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771634/691c9bd/6c2183e9/11a4ec27/3951206825/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190531_JH_20190531-fr-JH-threeupdates-ndnr_ndnr_b1&recurring=auto&amount=1&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** **[](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771634/691c9bd/6c2183e9/11a4ec24/3951206825/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190531_JH_20190531-fr-JH-threeupdates-ndnr_ndnr_b5&recurring=auto&amount=5&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** **[](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771634/691c9bd/6c2183e9/11a4ec25/3951206825/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190531_JH_20190531-fr-JH-threeupdates-ndnr_ndnr_b25&recurring=auto&amount=25&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** **[](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771634/691c9bd/6c2183e9/11a4ec22/3951206825/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190531_JH_20190531-fr-JH-threeupdates-ndnr_ndnr_b50&recurring=auto&amount=50&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** **[](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771634/691c9bd/6c2183e9/11a4ec23/3951206825/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190531_JH_20190531-fr-JH-threeupdates-ndnr_ndnr_b100&recurring=auto&amount=100&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** **[](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771634/691c9bd/6c2183e9/11a4ec20/3951206825/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190531_JH_20190531-fr-JH-threeupdates-ndnr_ndnr_bother&recurring=auto&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** I'm so grateful you're on this team and going on this journey with me.

Thank you,
John [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771634/691c9bd/6c2183e9/11a4ec21/3951206825/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190531_JH_20190531-fr-JH-threeupdates-ndnr_ndnr_contribbutton&recurring=auto&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

**** ****
---
| | Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020
---

PO Box 6377, Denver, CO 80206
Contributions or gifts to Hickenlooper 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, you can join the Hickenlooper 2020 team by **[_signing up right here_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771634/691c9bd/6c2183e9/11a4ec5e/3951206825/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/join-in")**.
Keep us company on the campaign trail by joining us on [_**Facebook**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771634/691c9bd/6c2183e9/11a4ec5f/3951206825/VEsHBA/ "https://www.facebook.com/JohnHickenlooper/"), [_**Twitter**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771634/691c9bd/6c2183e9/11a4ec5c/3951206825/VEsHBw/ "https://twitter.com/hickenlooper"), [_**Instagram**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771634/691c9bd/6c2183e9/11a4ec5d/3951206825/VEsHBg/ "https://www.instagram.com/johnhickenlooper/"), and [_**YouTube**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771634/691c9bd/6c2183e9/11a4ec5a/3951206825/VEsHAQ/ "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC82O0Byp_ny13O0LkO1UpUg/featured").
We love staying connected to you--but if at any point you'd like to opt out, you can do so right [here](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771634/691c9bd/6c2183e9/11a4ec5b/3951206825/VEsHAA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").
If we're not reaching you at the correct email address, please [_**update your information here**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771634/691c9bd/6c2183e9/11a4ec5e/3951206825/VEsHAw/ "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/join-in").

name: Dan Baer HQ
subject: the last time we'll ask you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan for Colorado
body:
Point blank: This race is too important to lose -- if we lose here's it's almost impossible to win the Senate.
|
---
[ ](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb826de/232dfd1/94313c5/62a1789a/255060076/VEsH/ "https://www.danforcolorado.com")

| | This is our final ask before tonight's End of Month Deadline. **[Can you rush in $19 to elect Dan, win Colorado, flip the Senate for Democrats, and finally oust Mitch McConnell?>>](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb826de/232dfd1/94313c5/62a1789b/255060076/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20180531_em_fr_b3_hq_all&amount=19&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**

Here's why we need you:

\-- The National Journal just rated Dan's opponent as the most vulnerable Senate Republican.

| | |
---
| |
---
| | I'm about to check my fundraising numbers for the final time tonight.

But first, I wanted to ask you personally: _[**I need a massive showing of support tonight before my midnight End of Month Deadline. Please, help to guarantee my spot at the next Democratic primary debates. It would mean so much to me if you 'd chip in $15 before midnight. >>**](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcdc9/3eb3e2fc/40a40eea/74497976/335163296/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20190531_em_fr_b4_castro_all&recur_weekly=on&recurring=on&amount=25")_

I wasn't born a frontrunner. No one where I grew up was a frontrunner.

And I know a whole lot of you and your families don't feel like frontrunners in this country either.

YOU are who I'll be speaking for in the Democratic Presidential debates -- but the rules say I need 400 donors from Florida to guarantee my spot in the next round.

So I'm humbly asking: Will you chip in $15 before my critical End of Month Deadline?
| | [**Chip in $15 now >> **](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcdc9/3eb3e2fc/40a40eea/74497975/335163296/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20190531_em_fr_b4_castro_all&recur_weekly=on&recurring=on&amount=15")
